  --   `╬╝ (pushforward ╧Ж) (..) (..)  тЙл  (pushforward ╧Ж).map (╬╝ (pushforward ╧И) X Y)`,
  -- and `pushforward_╬╝_eq` (├Ч2) reduces each `╬╝ (pushforward _)` to the lighter
  -- `╬╝ (restrictScalars _)` on the strong-monoidal `pushforwardтВА` objects.  On a pure tensor every
  -- `restrictScalars` ╬╝ is the identity (`ModuleCat.restrictScalars_╬╝_tmul`): the inner leg is
  -- collapsed by `forgetтВВ_restrictScalars_╬╝_hom_tmul` (`hinner`) and the `(pushforward ╧Ж).map тАж`
  -- leg by `pushforward_map_restrictScalars_╬╝_app_tmul` (`houter`, which reindexes the section map to
  -- `F.op.obj W` via `pushforward_map_app_apply` and collapses there).  After both legs the LHS is
  -- `m тКЧтВЬ n`, which is defeq to the RHS single-pushforward ╬╝ on the same pure tensor тАФ so the final
  -- `erw [houter]` closes the goal by its trailing `rfl`.  The heavy `pushforwardтВА` sections never
  -- get `whnf`-ed: all collapse lemmas are stated with atomic objects and applied to the goal's
  -- concrete objects as explicit arguments, then matched by `erw` up to the residual defeq
  -- `forgetтВВ`-association / instance differences only.
  refine PresheafOfModules.hom_ext (fun W => ?_)
  refine ModuleCat.MonoidalCategory.tensor_ext (fun m n => ?_)
  rw [Functor.LaxMonoidal.comp_╬╝]
  rw [pushforward_╬╝_eq, pushforward_╬╝_eq]
  rw [PresheafOfModules.comp_app]
  erw [ModuleCat.hom_comp, LinearMap.comp_apply]
  rw [restrictScalars_╬╝_app (R := SтВА) (S := F.op тЛЩ RтВА)]
  have hinner := forgetтВВ_restrictScalars_╬╝_hom_tmul (Rc := SтВА) (Sc := F.op тЛЩ RтВА) (╧Ж.app W)
    (((PresheafOfModules.pushforwardтВАOfCommRingCat F RтВА).obj ((PresheafOfModules.pushforward ╧И).obj X)).obj W)
    (((PresheafOfModules.pushforwardтВАOfCommRingCat F RтВА).obj ((PresheafOfModules.pushforward ╧И).obj Y)).obj W)
    m n
  erw [hinner]
  have houter := pushforward_map_restrictScalars_╬╝_app_tmul ╧Ж ╧И
    ((PresheafOfModules.pushforwardтВАOfCommRingCat G TтВА).obj X)
    ((PresheafOfModules.pushforwardтВАOfCommRingCat G TтВА).obj Y) W m n
  erw [houter]

/-- **Sq2b тАФ monoidality of `PresheafOfModules.pullbackComp` (the ╬┤-transport across the
left-adjoint composition iso).** The presheaf-level core of D3тА▓: the canonical oplax comparison
`╬┤` of the pullback for a composite ring map `╧Ж тЙл F.op тЧБ ╧И` transports, through the pullback
pseudofunctor coherence `pullbackComp ╧Ж ╧И`, into the `Functor.OplaxMonoidal.comp` comparison of
the composite `pullback ╧Ж тЛЩ pullback ╧И`.

This is the ╬╖тЖТ╬┤ analogue of `pullbackObjUnitToUnit_comp`, proved at the `PresheafOfModules` level
(dissolving the `forgetтВВ`-instance / associativity / reconcile frictions of working at the
`Scheme`/`forgetтВВ` level). The proof is the adjunction-mate calculus: transpose under
`pullbackPushforwardAdjunction (╧Ж тЙл F.op тЧБ ╧И)`, rewrite the oplax ╬┤ as the mate of the lax ╬╝
(`Adjunction.unit_app_tensor_comp_map_╬┤`), and use the conjugate identity
`conjugateEquiv_leftAdjointCompIso_inv` (here `pushforwardComp = Iso.refl`, so the mate of
`pullbackComp.inv` is the identity). The sole residual is the lax-╬╝ composition coherence of
`PresheafOfModules.pushforward` across `pushforwardComp` (`pushforwardComp_lax_╬╝`). -/
private lemma pullbackComp_╬┤
    {C D E : Type u} [Category.{u} C] [Category.{u} D] [Category.{u} E]
    {F : C тед D} {G : D тед E}
    {SтВА : Cс╡Тс╡Ц тед CommRingCat.{u}} {RтВА : Dс╡Тс╡Ц тед CommRingCat.{u}} {TтВА : Eс╡Тс╡Ц тед CommRingCat.{u}}
    (╧Ж : (SтВА тЛЩ forgetтВВ CommRingCat RingCat) тЯ╢
      F.op тЛЩ (RтВА тЛЩ forgetтВВ CommRingCat RingCat))
    (╧И : (RтВА тЛЩ forgetтВВ CommRingCat RingCat) тЯ╢
      G.op тЛЩ (TтВА тЛЩ forgetтВВ CommRingCat RingCat))
    [(PresheafOfModules.pushforward ╧Ж).IsRightAdjoint]
    [(PresheafOfModules.pushforward ╧И).IsRightAdjoint]
    (M N : _root_.PresheafOfModules (SтВА тЛЩ forgetтВВ CommRingCat RingCat)) :
    Functor.OplaxMonoidal.╬┤
        (PresheafOfModules.pullback (F := F тЛЩ G)
          (R := TтВА тЛЩ forgetтВВ CommRingCat RingCat) (╧Ж тЙл F.op.whiskerLeft ╧И)) M N =
      (PresheafOfModules.pullbackComp ╧Ж ╧И).inv.app (M тКЧ N) тЙл
        Functor.OplaxMonoidal.╬┤
          (PresheafOfModules.pullback ╧Ж тЛЩ PresheafOfModules.pullback ╧И) M N тЙл
        ((PresheafOfModules.pullbackComp ╧Ж ╧И).hom.app M тКЧтВШ
          (PresheafOfModules.pullbackComp ╧Ж ╧И).hom.app N) := by
  -- MATE CALCULUS (iter-259 derivation; reduces Sq2b to `pushforwardComp_lax_╬╝`).
  -- Transpose both sides under `a╧З.homEquiv` (`a╧З := pullbackPushforwardAdjunction (╧Ж тЙл F.op тЧБ ╧И)`):
  apply (PresheafOfModules.pullbackPushforwardAdjunction
    (F := F тЛЩ G) (R := TтВА тЛЩ forgetтВВ CommRingCat RingCat)
    (╧Ж тЙл F.op.whiskerLeft ╧И)).homEquiv _ _ |>.injective
  -- Both sides become `a╧З.unit (MтКЧN) тЙл (pushforward ╧З).map (тАж)`:
  rw [Adjunction.homEquiv_unit, Adjunction.homEquiv_unit]
  -- The remaining reduction (verified on paper; the wiring `rw`s are mechanical but fragile, and
  -- the *only* genuine gap is `pushforwardComp_lax_╬╝`, which is `rfl`-FALSE тАФ see below):
  --
  --   LHS = a╧З.unit(MтКЧN) тЙл (pushforward ╧З).map (╬┤ (pullback ╧З) M N)
  --       = (a╧З.unit M тКЧтВШ a╧З.unit N) тЙл ╬╝(pushforward ╧З) (pullback ╧З M) (pullback ╧З N)
  --                                          [Adjunction.unit_app_tensor_comp_map_╬┤ (adj := a╧З)]
  --
  --   RHS = a╧З.unit(MтКЧN) тЙл (pushforward ╧З).map (c.inv(MтКЧN) тЙл comp_╬┤ тЙл (c.hom M тКЧтВШ c.hom N))
  --       where c := pullbackComp ╧Ж ╧И.  Expand `map_comp`, then:
  --   (MATE)   a╧З.unit(MтКЧN) тЙл (pushforward ╧З).map (c.inv(MтКЧN)) = aC.unit(MтКЧN)
  --                              [Adjunction.unit_conjugateEquiv + conjugateEquiv_leftAdjointCompIso_inv;
  --                               here pushforwardComp = Iso.refl тЗТ the conjugate of c.inv is ЁЭЯЩ, so the
  --                               `pc.hom` factor vanishes]   (aC := a╧Ж.comp a╧И)
  --   (U-C)    aC.unit(MтКЧN) тЙл (pushforward ╧И тЛЩ pushforward ╧Ж).map (comp_╬┤) =
  --              (aC.unit M тКЧтВШ aC.unit N) тЙл ╬╝(pushforward ╧И тЛЩ pushforward ╧Ж) (LM) (LN)
  --                              [Adjunction.unit_app_tensor_comp_map_╬┤ (adj := aC); aC.IsMonoidal via
  --                               Adjunction.isMonoidal_comp; (pushforward ╧З).map тЙб (G'тЛЩG).map defeq]
  --   (╬╝-NAT)  ╬╝(pushforward ╧З) (LM)(LN) тЙл (pushforward ╧З).map (c.hom M тКЧтВШ c.hom N) =
  --              ((pushforward ╧З).map (c.hom M) тКЧтВШ (pushforward ╧З).map (c.hom N)) тЙл
  --                ╬╝(pushforward ╧З) (pullback ╧З M) (pullback ╧З N)   [Functor.LaxMonoidal.╬╝_natural]
  --   (TRI)    aC.unit P тЙл (pushforward ╧З).map (c.hom P) = a╧З.unit P   [(MATE) + c.inv тЙл c.hom = ЁЭЯЩ]
  --   tensorHom_comp_tensorHom merges the three тКЧтВШ legs; with (TRI) the RHS becomes
  --              (a╧З.unit M тКЧтВШ a╧З.unit N) тЙл ╬╝(pushforward ╧И тЛЩ pushforward ╧Ж) (pullback ╧З M)(pullback ╧З N).
  --
  -- LHS = RHS then holds IFF
  --   ╬╝(pushforward ╧И тЛЩ pushforward ╧Ж) X Y = ╬╝(pushforward ╧З) X Y   (= `pushforwardComp_lax_╬╝`).
  -- This is the SOLE residual.  It is NOT `rfl` (the `d3sq2b258` recipe's "rfl/short ext" prediction
  -- is empirically false): it is a genuine `ModuleCat` change-of-rings base-change coherence
  -- (`ModuleCat.restrictScalarsComp` / `homEquiv_extendScalarsComp`), with NO analog in the
  -- `rfl`-closed unit twin `unitToPushforwardObjUnit_comp`.  Pinned as `pushforwardComp_lax_╬╝` above.
  -- The mate-`rw` wiring of the steps above is left for the follow-up (each step's Mathlib lemma is
  -- named); the reduction itself is complete.  The LHS step (U) is wired here:
  erw [Adjunction.unit_app_tensor_comp_map_╬┤
    (adj := PresheafOfModules.pullbackPushforwardAdjunction
      (F := F тЛЩ G) (R := TтВА тЛЩ forgetтВВ CommRingCat RingCat) (╧Ж тЙл F.op.whiskerLeft ╧И))]
  -- (MATE): the conjugate/mate of `pullbackComp.inv` is `pushforwardComp.hom = ЁЭЯЩ`.
  -- (MATE) тАФ the conjugate of `pullbackComp.inv` is `pushforwardComp.hom = ЁЭЯЩ`:
  have hconj : conjugateEquiv
        ((PresheafOfModules.pullbackPushforwardAdjunction ╧Ж).comp
          (PresheafOfModules.pullbackPushforwardAdjunction ╧И))
        (PresheafOfModules.pullbackPushforwardAdjunction
          (F := F тЛЩ G) (R := TтВА тЛЩ forgetтВВ CommRingCat RingCat) (╧Ж тЙл F.op.whiskerLeft ╧И))
        (PresheafOfModules.pullbackComp ╧Ж ╧И).inv = ЁЭЯЩ _ := by
    simp only [PresheafOfModules.pullbackComp, Adjunction.conjugateEquiv_leftAdjointCompIso_inv,
      PresheafOfModules.pushforwardComp, Iso.refl_hom]
  have hmate : тИА (P : _root_.PresheafOfModules (SтВА тЛЩ forgetтВВ CommRingCat RingCat)),
      (PresheafOfModules.pullbackPushforwardAdjunction
          (F := F тЛЩ G) (R := TтВА тЛЩ forgetтВВ CommRingCat RingCat)
          (╧Ж тЙл F.op.whiskerLeft ╧И)).unit.app P тЙл
        (PresheafOfModules.pushforward (F := F тЛЩ G)
          (R := TтВА тЛЩ forgetтВВ CommRingCat RingCat) (╧Ж тЙл F.op.whiskerLeft ╧И)).map
          ((PresheafOfModules.pullbackComp ╧Ж ╧И).inv.app P) =
      ((PresheafOfModules.pullbackPushforwardAdjunction ╧Ж).comp
        (PresheafOfModules.pullbackPushforwardAdjunction ╧И)).unit.app P := by
    intro P
    have hu := unit_conjugateEquiv
      ((PresheafOfModules.pullbackPushforwardAdjunction ╧Ж).comp
        (PresheafOfModules.pullbackPushforwardAdjunction ╧И))
      (PresheafOfModules.pullbackPushforwardAdjunction
        (F := F тЛЩ G) (R := TтВА тЛЩ forgetтВВ CommRingCat RingCat) (╧Ж тЙл F.op.whiskerLeft ╧И))
      (PresheafOfModules.pullbackComp ╧Ж ╧И).inv P
    rw [hconj] at hu
    simp only [NatTrans.id_app, Category.comp_id] at hu
    exact hu.symm
  -- Expand the RHS `map` of the composite and apply (MATE):
  rw [Functor.map_comp, Functor.map_comp]
  erw [reassoc_of% (hmate (M тКЧ N))]
  -- (U-C): rewrite `aC.unit(MтКЧN) тЙл map(comp_╬┤)` via the mate of the composite adjunction `aC`:
  erw [reassoc_of% (Adjunction.unit_app_tensor_comp_map_╬┤
    (adj := (PresheafOfModules.pullbackPushforwardAdjunction ╧Ж).comp
      (PresheafOfModules.pullbackPushforwardAdjunction ╧И)) M N)]
  -- (╬╝-COH): replace the composite-pushforward ╬╝ by the ╧З-pushforward ╬╝ (the genuine residual):
  rw [pushforwardComp_lax_╬╝ ╧Ж ╧И]
  -- (TRI): for any `P`, `aC.unit P тЙл (pushforward ╧З).map (c.hom P) = a╧З.unit P`.
  have htri : тИА (P : _root_.PresheafOfModules (SтВА тЛЩ forgetтВВ CommRingCat RingCat)),
      ((PresheafOfModules.pullbackPushforwardAdjunction ╧Ж).comp
          (PresheafOfModules.pullbackPushforwardAdjunction ╧И)).unit.app P тЙл
        (PresheafOfModules.pushforward (F := F тЛЩ G)
          (R := TтВА тЛЩ forgetтВВ CommRingCat RingCat) (╧Ж тЙл F.op.whiskerLeft ╧И)).map
          ((PresheafOfModules.pullbackComp ╧Ж ╧И).hom.app P) =
      (PresheafOfModules.pullbackPushforwardAdjunction
        (F := F тЛЩ G) (R := TтВА тЛЩ forgetтВВ CommRingCat RingCat)
        (╧Ж тЙл F.op.whiskerLeft ╧И)).unit.app P := by
    intro P
    erw [тЖР reassoc_of% (hmate P)]
    erw [тЖР Functor.map_comp]
    erw [(PresheafOfModules.pullbackComp ╧Ж ╧И).inv_hom_id_app P, CategoryTheory.Functor.map_id,
      Category.comp_id]
  -- (╬╝-NAT): slide ╬╝ past `map (c.hom тКЧ c.hom)`, merge the legs, then apply (TRI):
  erw [тЖР Functor.LaxMonoidal.╬╝_natural]
  conv_lhs => rw [тЖР htri M, тЖР htri N]
  erw [тЖР MonoidalCategory.tensorHom_comp_tensorHom
    (C := _root_.PresheafOfModules (SтВА тЛЩ forgetтВВ CommRingCat RingCat))]
  exact Category.assoc _ _ _

/-- **Mate compatibility of `homEquiv` (project-local copy of `GlueDescent`'s device).** For
adjunctions `adjтВБ : LтВБ тКг RтВБ`, `adjтВВ : LтВВ тКг RтВВ` and `╬▒ : LтВВ тЯ╢ LтВБ`, transposing `╬▒.app c тЙл f` under
`adjтВВ` equals transposing `f` under `adjтВБ` post-composed with the conjugate transformation
`conjugateEquiv adjтВБ adjтВВ ╬▒` at `d`. This is the anti-circularity device of the D3тА▓ Sq1 mate
calculus: it lets the leading `pullbackComp` factor of the transposed `sheafificationCompPullback_comp`
goal be peeled while keeping `pullbackComp` OPAQUE (term-mode `.trans`, no `rw` on the iso). It is a
verbatim copy of `AlgebraicGeometry.Scheme.Modules.homEquiv_conjugateEquiv_app`
(`GlueDescent.lean:367`), reproduced here because `GlueDescent` is not imported by this file.
Derived from `CategoryTheory.unit_conjugateEquiv` + naturality of the conjugate. Project-local. -/
private lemma homEquiv_conjugateEquiv_app' {ЁЭТЮ ЁЭТЯ : Type*} [CategoryTheory.Category ЁЭТЮ]
    [CategoryTheory.Category ЁЭТЯ] {LтВБ LтВВ : ЁЭТЮ тед ЁЭТЯ} {RтВБ RтВВ : ЁЭТЯ тед ЁЭТЮ}
    (adjтВБ : LтВБ тКг RтВБ) (adjтВВ : LтВВ тКг RтВВ) (╬▒ : LтВВ тЯ╢ LтВБ) {c : ЁЭТЮ} {d : ЁЭТЯ}
    (f : LтВБ.obj c тЯ╢ d) :
    adjтВВ.homEquiv c d (╬▒.app c тЙл f)
      = adjтВБ.homEquiv c d f тЙл (CategoryTheory.conjugateEquiv adjтВБ adjтВВ ╬▒).app d := by
  have h1 := CategoryTheory.unit_conjugateEquiv adjтВБ adjтВВ ╬▒ c
  have huA : adjтВВ.homEquiv c d (╬▒.app c тЙл f)
      = adjтВВ.unit.app c тЙл RтВВ.map (╬▒.app c тЙл f) :=
    Adjunction.homEquiv_unit adjтВВ c d (╬▒.app c тЙл f)
  have huB : adjтВБ.homEquiv c d f = adjтВБ.unit.app c тЙл RтВБ.map f :=
    Adjunction.homEquiv_unit adjтВБ c d f
  have e1 : adjтВВ.homEquiv c d (╬▒.app c тЙл f)
      = (adjтВВ.unit.app c тЙл RтВВ.map (╬▒.app c)) тЙл RтВВ.map f :=
    huA.trans <| (CategoryTheory.whisker_eq (adjтВВ.unit.app c) (RтВВ.map_comp (╬▒.app c) f)).trans
      (Category.assoc _ _ _).symm
  have e2 : adjтВБ.homEquiv c d f тЙл (CategoryTheory.conjugateEquiv adjтВБ adjтВВ ╬▒).app d
      = (adjтВБ.unit.app c тЙл (CategoryTheory.conjugateEquiv adjтВБ adjтВВ ╬▒).app (LтВБ.obj c))
          тЙл RтВВ.map f :=
    (CategoryTheory.eq_whisker huB
        ((CategoryTheory.conjugateEquiv adjтВБ adjтВВ ╬▒).app d)).trans <|
      (Category.assoc _ _ _).trans <|
        (CategoryTheory.whisker_eq (adjтВБ.unit.app c)
          ((CategoryTheory.conjugateEquiv adjтВБ adjтВВ ╬▒).naturality f)).trans
          (Category.assoc _ _ _).symm
  exact e1.trans ((CategoryTheory.eq_whisker h1.symm (RтВВ.map f)).trans e2.symm)

/-- **Sheaf-level conjugate/mate of `pullbackComp.inv` (the R0-peel building block for Sq1).**
For composable scheme morphisms `h : Z тЯ╢ Y`, `f : Y тЯ╢ X` and any `Q : X.Modules`, the unit of the
composite-pullback adjunction `pullbackPushforwardAdjunction (h тЙл f)`, post-composed with the
pushforward of `pullbackComp.inv`, equals the unit of the *composite* of the `f`- and `h`-adjunctions,
post-composed with `pushforwardComp.hom`.  This is the `Scheme.Modules` (sheaf-level) instance of
`unit_conjugateEquiv` combined with `conjugateEquiv_pullbackComp_inv` (the mate of `pullbackComp.inv`
is `pushforwardComp.hom`); it is the cheap, sheafification-free piece of the Sq1 mate calculus that
peels the leading `R0 = pullbackComp.inv` factor.  Extracted from the inline `conj` of
`pullbackObjUnitToUnit_comp` so the (expensive, sheafification-laden) Sq1 reassembly can cite it
directly.  Project-local. -/
private lemma sheaf_unit_comp_pushforward_pullbackComp_inv {X Y Z : Scheme.{u}}
    (h : Z тЯ╢ Y) (f : Y тЯ╢ X) (Q : X.Modules) :
    (SheafOfModules.pullbackPushforwardAdjunction (Scheme.Hom.toRingCatSheafHom (h тЙл f))).unit.app Q тЙл
        (SheafOfModules.pushforward (Scheme.Hom.toRingCatSheafHom (h тЙл f))).map
          ((Scheme.Modules.pullbackComp h f).inv.app Q) =
      ((Scheme.Modules.pullbackPushforwardAdjunction f).comp
          (Scheme.Modules.pullbackPushforwardAdjunction h)).unit.app Q тЙл
        (Scheme.Modules.pushforwardComp h f).hom.app
          ((Scheme.Modules.pullback f тЛЩ Scheme.Modules.pullback h).obj Q) := by
  have conj := unit_conjugateEquiv
    ((Scheme.Modules.pullbackPushforwardAdjunction f).comp
      (Scheme.Modules.pullbackPushforwardAdjunction h))
    (Scheme.Modules.pullbackPushforwardAdjunction (h тЙл f))
    (Scheme.Modules.pullbackComp h f).inv Q
  rw [Scheme.Modules.conjugateEquiv_pullbackComp_inv] at conj
  exact conj.symm

/-- **STEP-1 bridge (presheafтЖФsheaf pushforward compatibility, the binding obligation of the D3тА▓
Sq1 tail).** The forgetful functor `SheafOfModules.forget` intertwines the sheaf-level
`SheafOfModules.pushforward ╧Ж` with the presheaf-level `PresheafOfModules.pushforward ╧Ж.hom`:
for any morphism `g` of sheaves of modules over `R`,
`forget.map ((pushforward ╧Ж).map g) = (PresheafOfModules.pushforward ╧Ж.hom).map (forget.map g)`.

This is the compatibility named in the blueprint's `lem:pullback_tensor_map_basechange` Sq1-tail
binding-obligation paragraph: it is what lets the recovered sheaf-level `B_f`/`B_h` unit factors
(which live under `SheafOfModules.pushforward`) be slid across into the presheaf-level
`PresheafOfModules.pushforward` of the unit identity.  It is *definitional* тАФ `SheafOfModules.pushforward`
is built sectionwise from `PresheafOfModules.pushforward` (`pushforward_map_val`) and `forget` is the
`.val` projection (`forget_map`), so the two sides are equal by `rfl`. -/
private lemma forget_map_pushforward_map
    {C : Type u} [Category.{u} C] {D : Type u} [Category.{u} D]
    {J : GrothendieckTopology C} {K : GrothendieckTopology D} {F : C тед D}
    {S : Sheaf J RingCat.{u}} {R : Sheaf K RingCat.{u}} [Functor.IsContinuous F J K]
    (╧Ж : S тЯ╢ (F.sheafPushforwardContinuous RingCat.{u} J K).obj R)
    {A B : SheafOfModules.{u} R} (g : A тЯ╢ B) :
    (SheafOfModules.forget S).map ((SheafOfModules.pushforward ╧Ж).map g) =
      (PresheafOfModules.pushforward ╧Ж.hom).map ((SheafOfModules.forget R).map g) := by
  rfl

-- The mate-calculus telescope (transpose under the composite adjunction `A_{hтЙлf}`, the R0-kill via
-- `homEquiv_conjugateEquiv_app'`, the adjтВБ split, and the R1-peel `hnatL`) elaborates the heavy
-- sheafification-laden `homEquiv` composites, exceeding the default 200000 heartbeat budget.
-- iter-310 SHARED KEY (`analogies/pullback-spelling-310.md`): the back-compat isDefEq path re-runs the
-- expensive transparency-respecting unfold loop on the opaque `Lan`-built `leftAdjoint`
-- (`Scheme.Modules.pullback f = SheafOfModules.pullback f.toRingCatSheafHom`).  Mathlib applies this
-- knob to EXACTLY these pullback-cocycle lemmas (Sheaf.lean:244/261/275/289); it stops the monolithic
-- `Scheme.Modules.pullback f тЙЯ SheafOfModules.pullback (toRingCatSheafHom f)` defeq from detonating.
set_option backward.isDefEq.respectTransparency false in
set_option maxHeartbeats 3200000 in
/-- **Sq1 тАФ composition coherence of `SheafOfModules.sheafificationCompPullback` (the S1 paste
square of D3тА▓).** For composable scheme morphisms `h : Z тЯ╢ Y`, `f : Y тЯ╢ X` and any presheaf of
modules `P` over `X`, the sheafificationтАУpullback comparison of the composite `h тЙл f` factors

    (T : _root_.PresheafOfModules (X.presheaf тЛЩ forgetтВВ CommRingCat RingCat)) :

/-- **Step-(i) middle-cancellation skeleton (instance-agnostic).** A purely categorical reassociation:
in any category, a 4-fold prefix ending in `d` composed with a tail beginning in its inverse `e`
(`d тЙл e = ЁЭЯЩ`) collapses the cancelling pair, leaving the prefix glued to the tail.  Stated and proved
generically so every `тЙл` shares ONE `Category` instance and `Category.assoc` reassociates freely; it is
then `exact`-applied (NOT `rw`-applied) against the concrete D3тА▓ goal, where the `sheafificationCompPullback`
/`pullbackComp` `.app`-components compose through DEFEQ-but-not-syntactic `SheafOfModules` instances тАФ
`exact` unifies up to defeq and so crosses the instance gap that blocks every `rw/simp [Category.assoc]`.
This is the device that lands step (i) of `pullbackTensorMap_restrict` without the mate-`whnf` bomb. -/
private lemma comp_cancel_mid {C : Type*} [Category C] {AтВА BтВА CтВА DтВА EтВА FтВА : C}
    (r0 : AтВА тЯ╢ BтВА) (r1 : BтВА тЯ╢ CтВА) (r5 : CтВА тЯ╢ DтВА) (d : DтВА тЯ╢ EтВА) (e : EтВА тЯ╢ DтВА)
    (rest : DтВА тЯ╢ FтВА) (hde : d тЙл e = ЁЭЯЩ DтВА) :
    (r0 тЙл r1 тЙл r5 тЙл d) тЙл e тЙл rest = r0 тЙл r1 тЙл r5 тЙл rest := by
  simp only [Category.assoc]
  rw [тЖР Category.assoc d e rest, hde, Category.id_comp]

/-- **Generic nested slide (mirrors the post-step-(ii) goal nesting exactly).** Substitutes the
buried pair `r5 тЙл p` (the `S1^h`-then-`a.map (Fp_h.map ╬┤_f)` factor) by `u тЙл v` through a different
intermediate object `d'`, leaving the post-substitution equation as the residual goal.  Applied by
`refine comp_slide_nested тАж hslide ?_`: the conclusion is written to mirror the goal's *literal*
parenthesisation `(r0 тЙл r1 тЙл r5 тЙл (p тЙл q) тЙл rtc) тЙл s3 тЙл s4`, so `refine` unifies it against the
goal by *metavariable assignment only* тАФ no keyed `simp`/`rw`/`erw` matching, hence no
`whnf`-bomb across the defeq-but-not-syntactic `SheafOfModules` instance boundary (the same reason
`comp_cancel_mid` lands step (i) by `exact`).  The actual `rw` runs on this lemma's own
single-`[Category C]` variables, where assoc is trivial. -/
private lemma comp_slide_nested {C : Type*} [Category C] {a b c d e k m n g d' : C}
    (r0 : a тЯ╢ b) (r1 : b тЯ╢ c) (r5 : c тЯ╢ d) (p : d тЯ╢ e) (q : e тЯ╢ k) (rtc : k тЯ╢ m)
    (s3 : m тЯ╢ n) (s4 : n тЯ╢ g) (u : c тЯ╢ d') (v : d' тЯ╢ e) (rhs : a тЯ╢ g)
    (hsl : r5 тЙл p = u тЙл v)
    (hrest : (r0 тЙл r1 тЙл (u тЙл v) тЙл q тЙл rtc) тЙл s3 тЙл s4 = rhs) :
    (r0 тЙл r1 тЙл r5 тЙл (p тЙл q) тЙл rtc) тЙл s3 тЙл s4 = rhs := by
  have hassoc : r5 тЙл (p тЙл q) тЙл rtc = (r5 тЙл p) тЙл q тЙл rtc := by
    simp only [Category.assoc]
  rw [hassoc, hsl]; exact hrest

/-- **Generic three-prefix cancellation across an L/R-defeq boundary.** The post-slide D3тА▓ residual
has the form `(r0 тЙл r1 тЙл (u тЙл v) тЙл q тЙл rtc) тЙл s3 тЙл s4 = r0' тЙл (m1 тЙл m2 тЙл m3 тЙл m4) тЙл тАж` where the
first three left factors `r0,r1,u` are *defeq-but-not-syntactically-equal* to the first three right
factors `r0',m1,m2` (the `SheafOfModules` vs `Scheme.Modules` pullback spellings).  Passing `rfl` for
`hr0/hr1/hu` discharges those leaf defeqs (small terms тАФ no big-composite `whnf`), then the generic
`subst`+assoc reduces the goal to the pure `hcore` (the merged Sq3/Sq4 chase).  Applied by
`refine comp_cancel_three_lr тАж rfl rfl rfl ?_`. -/
private lemma comp_cancel_three_lr {C : Type*} [Category C]
    {a b cc c' e kk mm nn g c4 c5 c6 c7 c8 c9 : C}
    (r0 : a тЯ╢ b) (r1 : b тЯ╢ cc) (u : cc тЯ╢ c') (v : c' тЯ╢ e) (q : e тЯ╢ kk) (rtc : kk тЯ╢ mm)
    (s3 : mm тЯ╢ nn) (s4 : nn тЯ╢ g)
    (r0' : a тЯ╢ b) (m1 : b тЯ╢ cc) (m2 : cc тЯ╢ c') (m3 : c' тЯ╢ c4) (m4 : c4 тЯ╢ c5) (vv : c5 тЯ╢ c6)
    (dh : c6 тЯ╢ c7) (sh3 : c7 тЯ╢ c8) (sh4 : c8 тЯ╢ c9) (tf : c9 тЯ╢ g)
    (hr0 : r0 = r0') (hr1 : r1 = m1) (hu : u = m2)
    (hcore : v тЙл q тЙл rtc тЙл s3 тЙл s4 = m3 тЙл m4 тЙл vv тЙл dh тЙл sh3 тЙл sh4 тЙл tf) :
    (r0 тЙл r1 тЙл (u тЙл v) тЙл q тЙл rtc) тЙл s3 тЙл s4
      = r0' тЙл (m1 тЙл m2 тЙл m3 тЙл m4) тЙл vv тЙл dh тЙл sh3 тЙл sh4 тЙл tf := by
  subst hr0 hr1 hu
  simp only [Category.assoc]
  rw [hcore]

/-- **Generic slide-then-cancel for the merged Sq3/Sq4 core (instance-agnostic).** The
post-`comp_cancel_three_lr` residual of `pullbackTensorMap_restrict` has the form
`v тЙл q тЙл rtc тЙл s3 тЙл s4 = m3 тЙл m4 тЙл vv тЙл dh тЙл sh3 тЙл sh4 тЙл tf`, where the RHS prefix
`m3 тЙл m4 тЙл vv` (`= (pullback h).map S3_f тЙл (pullback h).map S4_f тЙл S1_h''`) equals, by the
naturality of the connecting iso `sheafificationCompPullback h` at the morphism `gg`
(`a_Y.map gg = S3_f тЙл S4_f`), the slid form `v тЙл vtail` with `v = S1_h` (presheaf args) and
`vtail = a_Z.map (Fp_h.map gg)`.  Splicing that equation (`hcomb`) plus the resulting folded
presheaf core (`hcore2`) closes the goal.  Stated generically over one `[Category C]` so the
`subst`/`assoc` algebra never crosses the defeq-but-not-syntactic `SheafOfModules` instance
boundary that whnf-bombs `simp`/`rw`/`erw` on the concrete goal; applied by
`refine comp_slide_three тАж hcomb ?_` (assignment-only unification). -/
private lemma comp_slide_three {C : Type*} [Category C]
    {a b b3 c1 c2 c3 d1 d2 d3 d4 d5 g : C}
    (v : a тЯ╢ b) (q : b тЯ╢ c1) (rtc : c1 тЯ╢ c2) (s3 : c2 тЯ╢ c3) (s4 : c3 тЯ╢ g)
    (m3 : a тЯ╢ d1) (m4 : d1 тЯ╢ d2) (vv : d2 тЯ╢ b3) (dh : b3 тЯ╢ d3) (sh3 : d3 тЯ╢ d4)
    (sh4 : d4 тЯ╢ d5) (tf : d5 тЯ╢ g) (vtail : b тЯ╢ b3)
    (hcomb : m3 тЙл m4 тЙл vv = v тЙл vtail)
    (hcore2 : q тЙл rtc тЙл s3 тЙл s4 = vtail тЙл dh тЙл sh3 тЙл sh4 тЙл tf) :
    v тЙл q тЙл rtc тЙл s3 тЙл s4 = m3 тЙл m4 тЙл vv тЙл dh тЙл sh3 тЙл sh4 тЙл tf := by
  rw [hcore2, тЖР Category.assoc v vtail, тЖР hcomb]
  simp only [Category.assoc]

/-- **Generic merge-then-slide for the `hcomb` leg (instance-agnostic).** Over an abstract functor
`G`, `G.map s3f тЙл G.map s4f тЙл vv` merges (`Functor.map_comp`) and rewrites by `hg : gmap = s3f тЙл s4f`
to `G.map gmap тЙл vv`, closed by the naturality `hnat`.  Stated generically so the `assoc`/`map_comp`
algebra runs on clean abstract variables, never crossing the defeq-but-not-syntactic `SheafOfModules`
instance boundary that whnf-bombs `rw [тЖР Category.assoc]` / `rw [тЖР Functor.map_comp]` on the concrete
post-step-(ii) goal; applied by `exact map_comp_slide G _ _ gmap _ _ hg hnat`. -/
private lemma map_comp_slide {C D : Type*} [Category C] [Category D] (G : C тед D)
    {x y z : C} {w : D} (s3f : x тЯ╢ y) (s4f : y тЯ╢ z) (gmap : x тЯ╢ z)
    (vv : G.obj z тЯ╢ w) (rhs : G.obj x тЯ╢ w)
    (hg : gmap = s3f тЙл s4f) (hnat : G.map gmap тЙл vv = rhs) :
    G.map s3f тЙл G.map s4f тЙл vv = rhs := by
  have e : G.map s3f тЙл G.map s4f = G.map gmap := by rw [hg, Functor.map_comp]
  calc G.map s3f тЙл G.map s4f тЙл vv
        = (G.map s3f тЙл G.map s4f) тЙл vv := by rw [Category.assoc]
    _ = G.map gmap тЙл vv := by rw [e]
    _ = rhs := hnat

/-- **Generic fold-4-vs-5-under-a-functor reduction (instance-agnostic).** A 4-fold `F.map`-composite
equals a 5-fold `F.map`-composite as soon as the underlying presheaf composites agree (`hcore`).  The
`тЖР Functor.map_comp` merge runs on this lemma's own clean `[Category C]` variables, where the
discrimination-tree match is trivial; it is then applied to the merged Sq3/Sq4 core of
`pullbackTensorMap_restrict` by `refine map_comp4_eq_comp5 _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ ?_`
(assignment-only unification), crossing the defeq-but-not-syntactic `SheafOfModules` instance boundary
that whnf-bombs `simp`/`rw [тЖР Functor.map_comp]` on the concrete folded goal. -/
private lemma map_comp4_eq_comp5 {C D : Type*} [Category C] [Category D] (F : C тед D)
    {xтВА xтВБ xтВВ xтВГ xтВД : C} (aтВБ : xтВА тЯ╢ xтВБ) (aтВВ : xтВБ тЯ╢ xтВВ) (aтВГ : xтВВ тЯ╢ xтВГ) (aтВД : xтВГ тЯ╢ xтВД)
    {zтВБ zтВВ zтВГ zтВД : C} (bтВБ : xтВА тЯ╢ zтВБ) (bтВВ : zтВБ тЯ╢ zтВВ) (bтВГ : zтВВ тЯ╢ zтВГ) (bтВД : zтВГ тЯ╢ zтВД) (bтВЕ : zтВД тЯ╢ xтВД)
    (hcore : aтВБ тЙл aтВВ тЙл aтВГ тЙл aтВД = bтВБ тЙл bтВВ тЙл bтВГ тЙл bтВД тЙл bтВЕ) :
    F.map aтВБ тЙл F.map aтВВ тЙл F.map aтВГ тЙл F.map aтВД
      = F.map bтВБ тЙл F.map bтВВ тЙл F.map bтВГ тЙл F.map bтВД тЙл F.map bтВЕ := by
  simp only [тЖР Functor.map_comp]
  rw [hcore]

/-- **Generic bifunctorial collapse of a 3-vs-4 `tensorHom` chain to its two legs (instance-agnostic).**
A 3-fold composite of `tensorHom`s equals a 4-fold one as soon as the two underlying leg composites
agree (`hM`, `hN`).  The `tensorHom_comp_tensorHom` interchange runs on this lemma's own clean
`[MonoidalCategory C]` variables, then it is applied to the merged Sq3/Sq4 core of
`pullbackTensorMap_restrict` by `refine tensorHom_collapse_3_4 тАж ?_ ?_` (assignment-only unification),
crossing the non-canonical `MonoidalCategoryStruct` instance baked into the concrete goal on which
`simp`/`rw [tensorHom_comp_tensorHom]` makes no progress. -/
private lemma tensorHom_collapse_3_4 {C : Type*} [Category C] [MonoidalCategory C]
    {xMтВА xMтВБ xMтВВ xMтВГ xNтВА xNтВБ xNтВВ xNтВГ : C}
    (pтВБ : xMтВА тЯ╢ xMтВБ) (pтВВ : xMтВБ тЯ╢ xMтВВ) (pтВГ : xMтВВ тЯ╢ xMтВГ)
    (qтВБ : xNтВА тЯ╢ xNтВБ) (qтВВ : xNтВБ тЯ╢ xNтВВ) (qтВГ : xNтВВ тЯ╢ xNтВГ)
    {yMтВБ yMтВВ yMтВГ yNтВБ yNтВВ yNтВГ : C}
    (rтВБ : xMтВА тЯ╢ yMтВБ) (rтВВ : yMтВБ тЯ╢ yMтВВ) (rтВГ : yMтВВ тЯ╢ yMтВГ) (rтВД : yMтВГ тЯ╢ xMтВГ)
    (sтВБ : xNтВА тЯ╢ yNтВБ) (sтВВ : yNтВБ тЯ╢ yNтВВ) (sтВГ : yNтВВ тЯ╢ yNтВГ) (sтВД : yNтВГ тЯ╢ xNтВГ)
    (hM : pтВБ тЙл pтВВ тЙл pтВГ = rтВБ тЙл rтВВ тЙл rтВГ тЙл rтВД)
    (hN : qтВБ тЙл qтВВ тЙл qтВГ = sтВБ тЙл sтВВ тЙл sтВГ тЙл sтВД) :
    MonoidalCategory.tensorHom pтВБ qтВБ тЙл MonoidalCategory.tensorHom pтВВ qтВВ тЙл
        MonoidalCategory.tensorHom pтВГ qтВГ
      = MonoidalCategory.tensorHom rтВБ sтВБ тЙл MonoidalCategory.tensorHom rтВВ sтВВ тЙл
          MonoidalCategory.tensorHom rтВГ sтВГ тЙл MonoidalCategory.tensorHom rтВД sтВД := by
  simp only [MonoidalCategory.tensorHom_comp_tensorHom, hM, hN]

/-- **Generic adjunction unit-counit triangle (instance-agnostic).** For an adjunction `L тКг R` and
any `k : L.obj P тЯ╢ M`, sheafifying the unit-into-`R k` composite and post-composing the counit
recovers `k`.  This is the abstract triangle identity behind the `pullbackValIso` counit reassembly
(blueprint `lem:pullback_val_iso_comp_counit`, the (T) step): with `L = sheafification`,
`R = forget`, `P = pullback presheaf`, `M = sheaf pullback`, `k = (pullbackValIso _ _).hom`, it states
`a(╬╖ тЙл forget k) тЙл ╬╡ = k`.  Stated generically over one pair `[Category C]`/`[Category D]` so the
`Functor.map_comp`/`counit_naturality`/`left_triangle_components` algebra never crosses the
defeq-but-not-syntactic `SheafOfModules`/`Scheme.Modules` instance boundary; applied by `exact`. -/
private lemma adj_unit_map_counit {C D : Type*} [Category C] [Category D] {L : C тед D} {R : D тед C}
    (adj : L тКг R) (P : C) (M : D) (k : L.obj P тЯ╢ M) :
    L.map (adj.unit.app P тЙл R.map k) тЙл adj.counit.app M = k :=
  (adj.homEquiv P M).left_inv k

/-- **Generic forget-image cocycle reassembly (instance-agnostic).** Given the sheaf-level cocycle
`x тЙл y = x' тЙл y' тЙл z'` in `C`, its `F`-image, prefixed by any `╬╖`, reassembles as the matching
forget-image composite.  Stated over one `[Category C]`/`[Category D]` so the `Functor.map_comp`
merges run on clean abstract variables; applied to the concrete D3тА▓ reduction goal by `exact`, whose
defeq unification crosses the `Sheaf.val`/`ObjectProperty.obj` (deprecated-alias) boundary that
blocks `rw [тЖР Functor.map_comp]` on the concrete forget-images.  This is the (T)/(H)тЖТgoal bridge in
`pullbackValIso_comp_leg` (blueprint `lem:pullback_val_iso_comp`). -/
private lemma comp_forget_cocycle {C D : Type*} [Category C] [Category D] (F : C тед D)
    {a b c a' d' : C} {Wd : D} (╬╖ : Wd тЯ╢ F.obj a) (x : a тЯ╢ b) (y : b тЯ╢ c)
    (x' : a тЯ╢ a') (y' : a' тЯ╢ d') (z' : d' тЯ╢ c) (h : x тЙл y = x' тЙл y' тЙл z') :
    ╬╖ тЙл F.map x тЙл F.map y = ╬╖ тЙл F.map x' тЙл F.map y' тЙл F.map z' := by
  rw [тЖР Functor.map_comp, h, Functor.map_comp, Functor.map_comp]

/-- **Generic interleaved 3-pair telescope (instance-agnostic).** A palindromic composite collapses to
its centre `g` once the three nested pairs cancel (`AтЙлA' = BтЙлB' = CтЙлC' = ЁЭЯЩ`).  Stated over one
`[Category C]` so the `Category.assoc` flattening runs on clean abstract variables тАФ never on the
`SheafOfModules` carrier where `simp/rw [Category.assoc]` whnf-bombs тАФ then applied to the inverse of
`sheafificationCompPullback_comp` by `exact`.  This is the Sq4a telescope of
`sheafificationCompPullback_comp_inv`. -/
private lemma inv_telescope {C : Type*} [Category C] {w x y z t : C}
    (A : w тЯ╢ x) (A' : x тЯ╢ w) (B : x тЯ╢ y) (B' : y тЯ╢ x) (Cc : y тЯ╢ z) (C' : z тЯ╢ y) (g : w тЯ╢ t)
    (hA : A тЙл A' = ЁЭЯЩ w) (hB : B тЙл B' = ЁЭЯЩ x) (hC : Cc тЙл C' = ЁЭЯЩ y) :
    g = (A тЙл B тЙл Cc) тЙл C' тЙл B' тЙл A' тЙл g := by
  simp only [Category.assoc]
  rw [тЖР Category.assoc Cc C', hC, Category.id_comp, тЖР Category.assoc B B', hB, Category.id_comp,
    тЖР Category.assoc A A', hA, Category.id_comp]

/-- **Generic cocycle assembly (instance-agnostic).** The algebraic skeleton of the `pullbackValIso`
composition coherence `hH` in `pullbackValIso_comp_leg`: the LHS reassembles via the Sq4a inverse
(`h1`) and `pullbackComp` naturality (`h2`); the RHS via `sheafificationCompPullback h` naturality
(`h3`); the two meet through the adjunction triangle `h4`.  Stated over one `[Category C]`/`[Category D]`
with abstract `F` so the `Functor.map_comp` merges and `Category.assoc` reshuffles run on clean
variables (no `SheafOfModules` whnf-bomb); applied by `exact`. -/
private lemma cocycle_assemble {C D : Type*} [Category C] [Category D] (F : C тед D)
    {dA dB dC dD dQ : D} {cP cQ cR cS : C}
    (p : dA тЯ╢ dB) (sf : dB тЯ╢ dC) (m1 : dC тЯ╢ dD)
    (sh : dA тЯ╢ F.obj cP) (x1 : cP тЯ╢ cQ) (pa : F.obj cQ тЯ╢ dC) (x2 : cQ тЯ╢ cR) (pw : F.obj cR тЯ╢ dD)
    (q : dA тЯ╢ dQ) (sQ : dQ тЯ╢ F.obj cS) (x3 : cP тЯ╢ cS) (x4 : cS тЯ╢ cR)
    (h1 : p тЙл sf = sh тЙл F.map x1 тЙл pa) (h2 : pa тЙл m1 = F.map x2 тЙл pw)
    (h3 : q тЙл sQ = sh тЙл F.map x3) (h4 : x3 тЙл x4 = x1 тЙл x2) :
    p тЙл sf тЙл m1 = q тЙл (sQ тЙл F.map x4) тЙл pw := by
  rw [reassoc_of% h1, h2, Category.assoc sQ, reassoc_of% h3, тЖР Category.assoc (F.map x1),
    тЖР Functor.map_comp, тЖР Category.assoc (F.map x3), тЖР Functor.map_comp, h4]

set_option maxHeartbeats 1600000 in
/-- **Step-(ii) тАФ the `comp_╬┤` split of `╬┤comp` under `a_Z.map`.** The oplax tensorator of the
*composite* presheaf pullback `pullback ╧Ж'_f тЛЩ pullback ╧Ж'_h`, sheafified, decomposes (by the Mathlib
oplax-monoidal coherence `Functor.OplaxMonoidal.comp_╬┤` of a composite of left adjoints) into the
sheafification of `(pullback ╧Ж'_h).map ╬┤_f` followed by the sheafification of `╬┤_h` on the pulled-back
arguments. This is the mechanical step (ii) of the four-square interleave in
`pullbackTensorMap_restrict`; stated with the same `show тАж from` ring-map ascriptions as the proof's
`╬┤comp` binding so the `MonoidalCategory`/`forgetтВВ` instances pin identically (iter-257 finding (3)).
Project-local. -/
private lemma sheafifyMap_╬┤comp_split {X Y Z : Scheme.{u}} (h : Z тЯ╢ Y) (f : Y тЯ╢ X)
    (M N : X.Modules) :
    (PresheafOfModules.sheafification (ЁЭЯЩ (Sheaf.val Z.ringCatSheaf))).map
        (Functor.OplaxMonoidal.╬┤
          (PresheafOfModules.pullback
              (show (X.presheaf тЛЩ forgetтВВ CommRingCat RingCat) тЯ╢
                  (TopologicalSpace.Opens.map f.base).op тЛЩ (Y.presheaf тЛЩ forgetтВВ CommRingCat RingCat)
                from (Hom.toRingCatSheafHom f).hom) тЛЩ
            PresheafOfModules.pullback
              (show (Y.presheaf тЛЩ forgetтВВ CommRingCat RingCat) тЯ╢
                  (TopologicalSpace.Opens.map h.base).op тЛЩ (Z.presheaf тЛЩ forgetтВВ CommRingCat RingCat)
                from (Hom.toRingCatSheafHom h).hom))
          M.val N.val) =
      (PresheafOfModules.sheafification (ЁЭЯЩ (Sheaf.val Z.ringCatSheaf))).map
          ((PresheafOfModules.pullback
              (show (Y.presheaf тЛЩ forgetтВВ CommRingCat RingCat) тЯ╢
                  (TopologicalSpace.Opens.map h.base).op тЛЩ (Z.presheaf тЛЩ forgetтВВ CommRingCat RingCat)
                from (Hom.toRingCatSheafHom h).hom)).map
            (Functor.OplaxMonoidal.╬┤
              (PresheafOfModules.pullback
                (show (X.presheaf тЛЩ forgetтВВ CommRingCat RingCat) тЯ╢
                    (TopologicalSpace.Opens.map f.base).op тЛЩ (Y.presheaf тЛЩ forgetтВВ CommRingCat RingCat)
                  from (Hom.toRingCatSheafHom f).hom))
              M.val N.val)) тЙл
        (PresheafOfModules.sheafification (ЁЭЯЩ (Sheaf.val Z.ringCatSheaf))).map
          (Functor.OplaxMonoidal.╬┤
            (PresheafOfModules.pullback
              (show (Y.presheaf тЛЩ forgetтВВ CommRingCat RingCat) тЯ╢
                  (TopologicalSpace.Opens.map h.base).op тЛЩ (Z.presheaf тЛЩ forgetтВВ CommRingCat RingCat)
                from (Hom.toRingCatSheafHom h).hom))
            ((PresheafOfModules.pullback
              (show (X.presheaf тЛЩ forgetтВВ CommRingCat RingCat) тЯ╢
                  (TopologicalSpace.Opens.map f.base).op тЛЩ (Y.presheaf тЛЩ forgetтВВ CommRingCat RingCat)
                from (Hom.toRingCatSheafHom f).hom)).obj M.val)
            ((PresheafOfModules.pullback
              (show (X.presheaf тЛЩ forgetтВВ CommRingCat RingCat) тЯ╢
                  (TopologicalSpace.Opens.map f.base).op тЛЩ (Y.presheaf тЛЩ forgetтВВ CommRingCat RingCat)
                from (Hom.toRingCatSheafHom f).hom)).obj N.val)) := by
  -- `╬┤ (F тЛЩ G)` is *definitionally* `G.map (╬┤ F) тЙл ╬┤ G` (the `Functor.OplaxMonoidal.comp`
  -- instance), so after folding the two `a.map`s by `тЖР Functor.map_comp` the `congr 1` closes by `rfl`.
  rw [тЖР Functor.map_comp]
  congr 1

/-- **Sq4a тАФ inverse of the Sq1 coherence `sheafificationCompPullback_comp`** (blueprint
`lem:pullback_val_iso_comp_scpb`).  Taking inverses of the four-factor `sheafificationCompPullback_comp`
identity and cancelling `a_Z.map(PrPbComp.hom)` against the leading `a_Z.map(Pc)` gives the
`sheafCompPbтБ╗┬╣` reassembly consumed by `pullbackValIso_comp_leg`.  Project-local. -/
private lemma sheafificationCompPullback_comp_inv {X Y Z : Scheme.{u}} (h : Z тЯ╢ Y) (f : Y тЯ╢ X)
    (P : _root_.PresheafOfModules (X.presheaf тЛЩ forgetтВВ CommRingCat RingCat)) :
    (PresheafOfModules.sheafification (ЁЭЯЩ Z.ringCatSheaf.val)).map
          ((PresheafOfModules.pullbackComp (Hom.toRingCatSheafHom f).hom
            (Hom.toRingCatSheafHom h).hom).hom.app P) тЙл
        ((SheafOfModules.sheafificationCompPullback (Hom.toRingCatSheafHom (h тЙл f))).app P).inv
      = ((SheafOfModules.sheafificationCompPullback (Hom.toRingCatSheafHom h)).app
            ((PresheafOfModules.pullback (Hom.toRingCatSheafHom f).hom).obj P)).inv тЙл
          (SheafOfModules.pullback (Hom.toRingCatSheafHom h)).map
            ((SheafOfModules.sheafificationCompPullback (Hom.toRingCatSheafHom f)).app P).inv тЙл
          (SheafOfModules.pullbackComp (Hom.toRingCatSheafHom f) (Hom.toRingCatSheafHom h)).hom.app
            ((PresheafOfModules.sheafification (ЁЭЯЩ X.ringCatSheaf.val)).obj P) := by
  have hA : ((SheafOfModules.sheafificationCompPullback (Hom.toRingCatSheafHom h)).app
          ((PresheafOfModules.pullback (Hom.toRingCatSheafHom f).hom).obj P)).inv тЙл
        ((SheafOfModules.sheafificationCompPullback (Hom.toRingCatSheafHom h)).app
          ((PresheafOfModules.pullback (Hom.toRingCatSheafHom f).hom).obj P)).hom = ЁЭЯЩ _ :=
    Iso.inv_hom_id _
  have hB : (SheafOfModules.pullback (Hom.toRingCatSheafHom h)).map
          ((SheafOfModules.sheafificationCompPullback (Hom.toRingCatSheafHom f)).app P).inv тЙл
        (SheafOfModules.pullback (Hom.toRingCatSheafHom h)).map
          ((SheafOfModules.sheafificationCompPullback (Hom.toRingCatSheafHom f)).app P).hom = ЁЭЯЩ _ := by
    rw [тЖР Functor.map_comp, Iso.inv_hom_id, CategoryTheory.Functor.map_id]
  have hC : (SheafOfModules.pullbackComp (Hom.toRingCatSheafHom f) (Hom.toRingCatSheafHom h)).hom.app
          ((PresheafOfModules.sheafification (ЁЭЯЩ X.ringCatSheaf.val)).obj P) тЙл
        (SheafOfModules.pullbackComp (Hom.toRingCatSheafHom f) (Hom.toRingCatSheafHom h)).inv.app
          ((PresheafOfModules.sheafification (ЁЭЯЩ X.ringCatSheaf.val)).obj P) = ЁЭЯЩ _ :=
    Iso.hom_inv_id_app _ _
  rw [Iso.comp_inv_eq, sheafificationCompPullback_comp h f P]
  exact inv_telescope _ _ _ _ _ _ _ hA hB hC

/- Planner strategy (iter-019): closing the sole remaining `sorry` in `pullbackValIso_comp_leg`

       тЙл ph_h.map ((SCPb f).app P .hom) тЙл (SCPb h).app(pb_f P) .hom тЙл a_Z.map(pbс╡Ц.hom.app P)`

-- v4.31.0: the `simpa тАж using тАжunit.naturality` steps `hUZ1`/`hUZ2` reconcile the composite
-- ring-map spelling `(╧Жf тЙл whiskerLeft тАж ╧Жh)` / `(pullback ╧Жf тЛЩ pullback ╧Жh)` of the naturality
-- term against the `(toRingCatSheafHom (h тЙл f))` / nested-`pullback.obj` spelling of the goal тАФ

/-- **Sq4 тАФ the per-leg `pullbackValIso` composition coherence** (blueprint `lem:pullback_val_iso_comp`).
For composable `h : Z тЯ╢ Y`, `f : Y тЯ╢ X` and `W : X.Modules`, the canonical "sheafification-unit into the
underlying presheaf of the pullback" тАФ `╬╖ тЙл forget (pullbackValIso ┬╖ W).hom` тАФ composes
pseudofunctorially across `h тЙл f`, reconciling `pullbackValIso (h тЙл f)`, `pullbackValIso h`,
`pullbackValIso f`, the presheaf coherence `PresheafOfModules.pullbackComp` and the sheaf coherence
`pullbackComp h f`. This is the single per-leg residual of the merged Sq3/Sq4 presheaf core of
`pullbackTensorMap_restrict` (applied once for `M` and once for `N`).

By `def:pullback_val_iso`, `pullbackValIso f W = (sheafificationCompPullback f).symm.app W.val тЙктЙл
(pullback f).mapIso (sheafification counit at W)`; substituting this factorisation on every leg, the
`sheafCompPbтБ╗┬╣` parts reassemble via the Sq1 coherence `sheafificationCompPullback_comp` and the counit
parts via counit naturality. -/
lemma pullbackValIso_comp_leg {X Y Z : Scheme.{u}} (h : Z тЯ╢ Y) (f : Y тЯ╢ X) (W : X.Modules) :
    (PresheafOfModules.pullbackComp (Hom.toRingCatSheafHom f).hom
          (Hom.toRingCatSheafHom h).hom).hom.app W.val тЙл
        (PresheafOfModules.sheafificationAdjunction (ЁЭЯЩ (Sheaf.val Z.ringCatSheaf))).unit.app
            ((PresheafOfModules.pullback (Hom.toRingCatSheafHom (h тЙл f)).hom).obj W.val) тЙл
          (SheafOfModules.forget Z.ringCatSheaf).map (pullbackValIso (h тЙл f) W).hom
      = (PresheafOfModules.pullback (Hom.toRingCatSheafHom h).hom).map
            ((PresheafOfModules.sheafificationAdjunction (ЁЭЯЩ (Sheaf.val Y.ringCatSheaf))).unit.app
                ((PresheafOfModules.pullback (Hom.toRingCatSheafHom f).hom).obj W.val) тЙл
              (SheafOfModules.forget Y.ringCatSheaf).map (pullbackValIso f W).hom) тЙл
          (PresheafOfModules.sheafificationAdjunction (ЁЭЯЩ (Sheaf.val Z.ringCatSheaf))).unit.app
              ((PresheafOfModules.pullback (Hom.toRingCatSheafHom h).hom).obj
                ((pullback f).obj W).val) тЙл
            (SheafOfModules.forget Z.ringCatSheaf).map (pullbackValIso h ((pullback f).obj W)).hom тЙл
              (SheafOfModules.forget Z.ringCatSheaf).map ((pullbackComp h f).app W).hom := by
  -- ITER-019+ (prover): full chase via the SHEAF-LEVEL cocycle `hH` (blueprint `lem:pullback_val_iso_comp`).
  -- The leading sheafification unit `╬╖^Z_{phh(phf W.val)}` and the forgetful functor `forget Z` are
  -- factored out by unit naturality; what remains is the clean `SheafOfModules Z`-level identity `hH`,
  -- proved by Sq4a (`sheafificationCompPullback_comp`, inverted), naturality of `pullbackComp h f` at the
  -- counit `╬╡^X_W`, naturality of `sheafificationCompPullback h`, and the adjunction triangle
  -- `adj_unit_map_counit` (the (T) step).  See task_results for the paper proof.
  -- Abbreviations used in comments: aZ/aY = sheafification, FZ/FY = forget, phf/phh/phhf = presheaf
  -- pullbacks, ╬╖Z/╬╖Y = sheafification units, ╬╡X/╬╡Y = sheafification counits, Pc = PrPbComp.hom.app W.val,
  -- b = ╬╖Y.app(phf W.val) тЙл FY.map (pVI f W).hom, SCg = sheafificationCompPullback, PBg = sheaf pullback.
  -- Unit naturality of ╬╖^Z at `Pc` (LHS) and at `phh.map b` (RHS).
  have hUZ1 :
      (PresheafOfModules.pullbackComp (Hom.toRingCatSheafHom f).hom
            (Hom.toRingCatSheafHom h).hom).hom.app W.val тЙл
          (PresheafOfModules.sheafificationAdjunction (ЁЭЯЩ (Sheaf.val Z.ringCatSheaf))).unit.app
            ((PresheafOfModules.pullback (Hom.toRingCatSheafHom (h тЙл f)).hom).obj W.val)
        = (PresheafOfModules.sheafificationAdjunction (ЁЭЯЩ (Sheaf.val Z.ringCatSheaf))).unit.app
              ((PresheafOfModules.pullback (Hom.toRingCatSheafHom h).hom).obj
                ((PresheafOfModules.pullback (Hom.toRingCatSheafHom f).hom).obj W.val)) тЙл
            (SheafOfModules.forget Z.ringCatSheaf).map
              ((PresheafOfModules.sheafification (ЁЭЯЩ Z.ringCatSheaf.val)).map
                ((PresheafOfModules.pullbackComp (Hom.toRingCatSheafHom f).hom
                  (Hom.toRingCatSheafHom h).hom).hom.app W.val)) := by
    -- v4.31.0: `simpa тАж using` closes with reducible-transparency `isDefEq`, which no longer bridges
    -- the `Functor.comp.obj` object-spelling and the `toRingCatSheafHom (h тЙл f) = ╧Жf тЙл whiskerLeft ╧Жh`
    -- reconciliation (a `def`-level `rfl`).  Land the naturality into a hypothesis, normalize it, and
    -- close by a bare `exact` (default-transparency `isDefEq`, which sees through both).
    have hnat := (PresheafOfModules.sheafificationAdjunction
        (ЁЭЯЩ (Sheaf.val Z.ringCatSheaf))).unit.naturality
          ((PresheafOfModules.pullbackComp (Hom.toRingCatSheafHom f).hom
            (Hom.toRingCatSheafHom h).hom).hom.app W.val)
    simp only [Functor.id_map, Functor.comp_map, restrictScalarsId_map] at hnat
    exact hnat
  have hUZ2 :
      (PresheafOfModules.pullback (Hom.toRingCatSheafHom h).hom).map
            ((PresheafOfModules.sheafificationAdjunction (ЁЭЯЩ (Sheaf.val Y.ringCatSheaf))).unit.app
                ((PresheafOfModules.pullback (Hom.toRingCatSheafHom f).hom).obj W.val) тЙл
              (SheafOfModules.forget Y.ringCatSheaf).map (pullbackValIso f W).hom) тЙл
          (PresheafOfModules.sheafificationAdjunction (ЁЭЯЩ (Sheaf.val Z.ringCatSheaf))).unit.app
            ((PresheafOfModules.pullback (Hom.toRingCatSheafHom h).hom).obj
              ((pullback f).obj W).val)
        = (PresheafOfModules.sheafificationAdjunction (ЁЭЯЩ (Sheaf.val Z.ringCatSheaf))).unit.app
              ((PresheafOfModules.pullback (Hom.toRingCatSheafHom h).hom).obj
                ((PresheafOfModules.pullback (Hom.toRingCatSheafHom f).hom).obj W.val)) тЙл
            (SheafOfModules.forget Z.ringCatSheaf).map
              ((PresheafOfModules.sheafification (ЁЭЯЩ Z.ringCatSheaf.val)).map
                ((PresheafOfModules.pullback (Hom.toRingCatSheafHom h).hom).map
                  ((PresheafOfModules.sheafificationAdjunction (ЁЭЯЩ (Sheaf.val Y.ringCatSheaf))).unit.app
                      ((PresheafOfModules.pullback (Hom.toRingCatSheafHom f).hom).obj W.val) тЙл
                    (SheafOfModules.forget Y.ringCatSheaf).map (pullbackValIso f W).hom))) := by
    have hnat := (PresheafOfModules.sheafificationAdjunction
        (ЁЭЯЩ (Sheaf.val Z.ringCatSheaf))).unit.naturality
          ((PresheafOfModules.pullback (Hom.toRingCatSheafHom h).hom).map
            ((PresheafOfModules.sheafificationAdjunction (ЁЭЯЩ (Sheaf.val Y.ringCatSheaf))).unit.app
                ((PresheafOfModules.pullback (Hom.toRingCatSheafHom f).hom).obj W.val) тЙл
              (SheafOfModules.forget Y.ringCatSheaf).map (pullbackValIso f W).hom))
    simp only [Functor.id_map, Functor.comp_map, restrictScalarsId_map] at hnat
    exact hnat
  -- The sheaf-level cocycle (H): the genuine content, in `SheafOfModules Z`.
  have hH :
      (PresheafOfModules.sheafification (ЁЭЯЩ Z.ringCatSheaf.val)).map
            ((PresheafOfModules.pullbackComp (Hom.toRingCatSheafHom f).hom
              (Hom.toRingCatSheafHom h).hom).hom.app W.val) тЙл
          (pullbackValIso (h тЙл f) W).hom
        = (PresheafOfModules.sheafification (ЁЭЯЩ Z.ringCatSheaf.val)).map
              ((PresheafOfModules.pullback (Hom.toRingCatSheafHom h).hom).map
                ((PresheafOfModules.sheafificationAdjunction (ЁЭЯЩ (Sheaf.val Y.ringCatSheaf))).unit.app
                    ((PresheafOfModules.pullback (Hom.toRingCatSheafHom f).hom).obj W.val) тЙл
                  (SheafOfModules.forget Y.ringCatSheaf).map (pullbackValIso f W).hom)) тЙл
            (pullbackValIso h ((pullback f).obj W)).hom тЙл ((pullbackComp h f).app W).hom := by
    set b := (PresheafOfModules.sheafificationAdjunction (ЁЭЯЩ (Sheaf.val Y.ringCatSheaf))).unit.app
          ((PresheafOfModules.pullback (Hom.toRingCatSheafHom f).hom).obj W.val) тЙл
        (SheafOfModules.forget Y.ringCatSheaf).map (pullbackValIso f W).hom with hb
    -- Unfold pVI on the (hтЙлf)- and h-legs (the f-leg is hidden inside the opaque `b`).
    simp only [pullbackValIso, Iso.trans_hom, Iso.symm_hom, Functor.mapIso_hom]
    have h1 := sheafificationCompPullback_comp_inv h f W.val
    have h2 := ((Scheme.Modules.pullbackComp h f).hom.naturality
      (((asIso (PresheafOfModules.sheafificationAdjunction
        (R := X.ringCatSheaf) (ЁЭЯЩ X.ringCatSheaf.val)).counit).app W).hom)).symm
    have h3 := (SheafOfModules.sheafificationCompPullback (Hom.toRingCatSheafHom h)).inv.naturality b
    -- (T): the adjunction triangle for the sheafification adjunction on `Y`.
    have h4 : (PresheafOfModules.sheafification (ЁЭЯЩ Y.ringCatSheaf.val)).map b тЙл
          (((asIso (PresheafOfModules.sheafificationAdjunction
            (R := Y.ringCatSheaf) (ЁЭЯЩ Y.ringCatSheaf.val)).counit).app ((pullback f).obj W)).hom)
        = (pullbackValIso f W).hom :=
      adj_unit_map_counit
        (PresheafOfModules.sheafificationAdjunction (ЁЭЯЩ (Sheaf.val Y.ringCatSheaf)))
        ((PresheafOfModules.pullback (Hom.toRingCatSheafHom f).hom).obj W.val)
        ((pullback f).obj W) (pullbackValIso f W).hom
    exact cocycle_assemble (Scheme.Modules.pullback h) _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ h1 h2 h3 h4
  -- Reduction: rewrite each side as `╬╖^Z_{phh(phf W.val)} тЙл forget Z (┬╖)` and close by `hH`.
  slice_lhs 1 2 => rw [hUZ1]
  slice_rhs 1 2 => rw [hUZ2]
  exact comp_forget_cocycle (SheafOfModules.forget Z.ringCatSheaf) _ _ _ _ _ _ hH


set_option maxHeartbeats 3200000 in
/-- **D3тА▓ тАФ composition coherence of the sheaf-level pullbackтАУtensor comparison `pullbackTensorMap`**
(blueprint `lem:pullback_tensor_map_basechange`).

This is the *tensorator* analog of the unit composition coherence
`pullbackObjUnitToUnit_comp`: for composable scheme morphisms `h : Z тЯ╢ Y`, `f : Y тЯ╢ X` and
arbitrary `M N : X.Modules`, the comparison `╬┤_sheaf = pullbackTensorMap (h тЙл f)` of the composite
factors through the comparisons of `f` and `h` and the pullback pseudofunctor coherence
`pullbackComp`:
`pullbackTensorMap (hтЙлf) M N = (pullbackComp h f).inv тЙл (pullback h).map (pullbackTensorMap f) тЙл
  pullbackTensorMap h (f^*M) (f^*N) тЙл tensorObjIsoOfIso (pullbackComp h f) (pullbackComp h f)`.

  The base-change-square form of the blueprint (`f тИШ j' = j тИШ g` with `j, j'` open immersions) is the
  specialisation `h := j'`, `f`, applied to the two factorisations `j' тЙл f = g тЙл j` of the equal
  underlying morphisms; the displayed identity of the restricted comparisons follows by equating the
  two instances of this coherence. Consumed by D4тА▓ `pullbackTensorIsoOfLocallyTrivial`.

Mathlib-absent at the pinned commit; NOT a sectionwise statement (the left-adjoint pullback exposes
no sectionwise value). Proved by the mate calculus through the oplax comparison `╬┤` of a composite of
left adjoints (`Functor.OplaxMonoidal.comp_╬┤`) and the adjunction-mate identity
`conjugateEquiv_pullbackComp_inv` (`pullbackComp` for the left adjoints тЖФ `pushforwardComp` for the
right adjoints), exactly mirroring `pullbackObjUnitToUnit_comp`. -/
lemma pullbackTensorMap_restrict {X Y Z : Scheme.{u}} (h : Z тЯ╢ Y) (f : Y тЯ╢ X)
    (M N : X.Modules) :
    pullbackTensorMap (h тЙл f) M N =
      (Scheme.Modules.pullbackComp h f).inv.app (tensorObj M N) тЙл
      (Scheme.Modules.pullback h).map (pullbackTensorMap f M N) тЙл
      pullbackTensorMap h ((Scheme.Modules.pullback f).obj M)
        ((Scheme.Modules.pullback f).obj N) тЙл
      (tensorObjIsoOfIso ((Scheme.Modules.pullbackComp h f).app M)
        ((Scheme.Modules.pullbackComp h f).app N)).hom := by
  -- ROADMAP (iter-256 handoff). Unfolding `pullbackTensorMap` on both sides (verified) exposes the
  -- four-fold composite `S1 тЙл a.map ╬┤ тЙл S3 тЙл S4` with
  --   S1 = (sheafificationCompPullback ╧Ж_{┬╖}).app (M.val тКЧтВЪ N.val) .hom,
  --   S2 = a_┬╖.map (Functor.OplaxMonoidal.╬┤ (PresheafOfModules.pullback ╧Ж'_{┬╖}) M.val N.val),
  --   S3 = (sheafifyTensorUnitIso (Fp M.val) (Fp N.val)).hom,

private lemma isIso_of_isIso_comp4_mid {C : Type*} [Category C] {WтВА XтВА YтВА ZтВА TтВА : C}
    {a : WтВА тЯ╢ XтВА} {b : XтВА тЯ╢ YтВА} {c : YтВА тЯ╢ ZтВА} {d : ZтВА тЯ╢ TтВА}

  haveI := h; haveI := ha; haveI := hc; haveI := hd

/-- **Helper (trivial-base reduction): `pullbackTensorMap` is an iso when both base modules
are trivial.** For `f : Y тЯ╢ X` and `P Q : X.Modules` each isomorphic to the unit `ЁЭТк_X`, the
comparison `pullbackTensorMap f P Q` is an isomorphism. Proof: conjugate the unit-pair iso
`pullbackTensorMap_unit_isIso` by the trivialisations `eP, eQ` through the naturality square
`pullbackTensorMap_natural`. Both flanking factors of that square are isos (functor-images and
`tensorObjIsoOfIso` of isos), so the unit-pair iso transports to `pullbackTensorMap f P Q`. -/
private lemma pullbackTensorMap_isIso_of_base_unit {X Y : Scheme.{u}} (f : Y тЯ╢ X)
    {P Q : X.Modules} (eP : P тЙЕ SheafOfModules.unit X.ringCatSheaf)
    (eQ : Q тЙЕ SheafOfModules.unit X.ringCatSheaf) :
    IsIso (pullbackTensorMap f P Q) := by
  have hnat := pullbackTensorMap_natural f eP.hom eQ.hom
  -- the `tensorObj_functoriality` of two isos is the `.hom` of `tensorObjIsoOfIso`, hence iso.
  haveI : IsIso (tensorObj_functoriality eP.hom eQ.hom) :=
    (tensorObjIsoOfIso eP eQ).isIso_hom
  haveI : IsIso (pullbackTensorMap f (SheafOfModules.unit X.ringCatSheaf)
      (SheafOfModules.unit X.ringCatSheaf)) := pullbackTensorMap_unit_isIso f
  haveI : IsIso ((Scheme.Modules.pullback f).map (tensorObj_functoriality eP.hom eQ.hom)) :=
    Functor.map_isIso _ _
  haveI hG : IsIso (tensorObj_functoriality ((Scheme.Modules.pullback f).map eP.hom)
      ((Scheme.Modules.pullback f).map eQ.hom)) :=
    (tensorObjIsoOfIso ((Scheme.Modules.pullback f).mapIso eP)
      ((Scheme.Modules.pullback f).mapIso eQ)).isIso_hom
  haveI hL : IsIso ((Scheme.Modules.pullback f).map (tensorObj_functoriality eP.hom eQ.hom) тЙл
      pullbackTensorMap f (SheafOfModules.unit X.ringCatSheaf)
        (SheafOfModules.unit X.ringCatSheaf)) := inferInstance
  rw [hnat] at hL
  exact IsIso.of_isIso_comp_right (pullbackTensorMap f P Q)
    (tensorObj_functoriality ((Scheme.Modules.pullback f).map eP.hom)
      ((Scheme.Modules.pullback f).map eQ.hom))

/-- **Sectionwise value of the presheaf-level `pushforwardPushforwardAdj` unit.** The unit of
`pushforwardPushforwardAdj adj ╧Ж ╧И HтВБ HтВВ : pushforward ╧Ж тКг pushforward ╧И` is the four-fold composite
`(pushforwardId _).inv тЙл pushforwardNatTrans (ЁЭЯЩ _) adj.counit тЙл (pushforwardCongr _).hom тЙл
(pushforwardComp _ _).inv`.  Both `pushforwardId` and `pushforwardComp` are `Iso.refl` (identity on
carriers), and `pushforwardNatTrans`/`pushforwardCongr` act on carriers by the presheaf restriction
map of `M` along `adj.counit` (the `restrictScalars` base change is the identity on the underlying
abelian group).  Hence on a section at `U`, the unit is just `M.map (adj.counit.app U.unop).op`.

    {C : Type u} [Category.{u} C] {D : Type u} [Category.{u} D]
    {F : C тед D} {G : D тед C} {S : Cс╡Тс╡Ц тед RingCat.{u}} {R : Dс╡Тс╡Ц тед RingCat.{u}}
    (adj : F тКг G) (╧Ж : S тЯ╢ F.op тЛЩ R) (╧И : R тЯ╢ G.op тЛЩ S)
    (HтВБ : Functor.whiskerRight (NatTrans.op adj.counit) R = ╧И тЙл G.op.whiskerLeft ╧Ж)
    (HтВВ : ╧Ж тЙл F.op.whiskerLeft ╧И тЙл Functor.whiskerRight (NatTrans.op adj.unit) S = ЁЭЯЩ S)

/-- **Sectionwise value of the presheaf-level `pushforwardPushforwardAdj` counit** (dual of
`pushforwardPushforwardAdj_unit_app_app_apply`). The counit of
`pushforwardPushforwardAdj adj ╧Ж ╧И HтВБ HтВВ : pushforward ╧Ж тКг pushforward ╧И` is the four-fold composite

    {F : C тед D} {G : D тед C} {S : Cс╡Тс╡Ц тед RingCat.{u}} {R : Dс╡Тс╡Ц тед RingCat.{u}}
    (adj : F тКг G) (╧Ж : S тЯ╢ F.op тЛЩ R) (╧И : R тЯ╢ G.op тЛЩ S)
    (HтВБ : Functor.whiskerRight (NatTrans.op adj.counit) R = ╧И тЙл G.op.whiskerLeft ╧Ж)
    (HтВВ : ╧Ж тЙл F.op.whiskerLeft ╧И тЙл Functor.whiskerRight (NatTrans.op adj.unit) S = ЁЭЯЩ S)

    (((PresheafOfModules.pushforwardPushforwardAdj adj ╧Ж ╧И HтВБ HтВВ).counit.app N).app U).hom y

For a sectionwise-bijective ground-ring map `╬▒`, the oplax monoidal unit `╬╖ (restrictScalars ╬▒)`

lemma restrictScalars_oplaxMonoidal_╬╖_app_one {C : Type u} [Category.{u} C]
    {R S : Cс╡Тс╡Ц тед CommRingCat.{u}}

functor `G╬▓ = pushforwardтВАOfCommRingCat f.opensFunctor X.presheaf тЛЩ restrictScalars ╬▓'`, and the

private lemma pushforward_eta_appIso_collapse {X Y : Scheme.{u}} (f : Y тЯ╢ X) [IsOpenImmersion f] :
    letI ╧Ж' : (X.presheaf тЛЩ forgetтВВ CommRingCat RingCat) тЯ╢
        (TopologicalSpace.Opens.map f.base).op тЛЩ (Y.presheaf тЛЩ forgetтВВ CommRingCat RingCat) :=
        (f.toRingCatSheafHom).hom

/-- **Sectionwise value of the RHS composition tensorator on a pure tensor (blueprint
`lem:pushforward_lax_mu_comparison_rhs_tmul`).** The directly-defined composition lax tensorator
`╬╝ (presheafPushforwardLaxMonoidal ╧Ж)` (= the ambient `Functor.LaxMonoidal.╬╝ (pushforward ╧Ж)`),
evaluated on a section `W` at a pure tensor `m тКЧтВЬ n`, is the base-change value `m тКЧтВЬ n`. By
`pushforward_╬╝_eq` (a `rfl`-identity) the single-pushforward ╬╝ is *defeq* to the `restrictScalars ╧Ж'`
╬╝ on the `pushforwardтВАOfCommRingCat`-reindexed objects, which collapses on a pure tensor by
`restrictScalars_╬╝_app_tmul` (the same helper family as `pushforwardComp_lax_╬╝`). Stated with abstract
base ring functors and objects (so the section module instances resolve cleanly, exactly as in
`restrictScalars_╬╝_app_tmul`); applied in the K1 assembly to `TтВА := (Opens.map f.base).op тЛЩ Y.presheaf`,
`MтВБ := pushforwardтВА.obj (G╬▓.obj A)` etc. by definitional equality. -/
lemma pushforward_lax_mu_comparison_rhs_tmul
    {C : Type u} [Category.{u} C] {SтВА TтВА : Cс╡Тс╡Ц тед CommRingCat.{u}}
    (╧Ж' : (SтВА тЛЩ forgetтВВ CommRingCat RingCat) тЯ╢ (TтВА тЛЩ forgetтВВ CommRingCat RingCat))
    (MтВБ MтВВ : _root_.PresheafOfModules (TтВА тЛЩ forgetтВВ CommRingCat RingCat)) (W : Cс╡Тс╡Ц)
    (m : (MтВБ.obj W)) (n : (MтВВ.obj W)) :
    ((Functor.LaxMonoidal.╬╝ (PresheafOfModules.restrictScalars ╧Ж') MтВБ MтВВ).app W).hom
        (m тКЧтВЬ[(SтВА тЛЩ forgetтВВ CommRingCat RingCat).obj W] n) = m тКЧтВЬ n :=
  -- The RHS composition tensorator `╬╝ (presheafPushforwardLaxMonoidal ╧Ж)` is, by `pushforward_╬╝_eq`
  -- (a `rfl`-identity), exactly this `restrictScalars ╧Ж'` ╬╝ on the `pushforwardтВА`-reindexed objects;
  -- `restrictScalars_╬╝_app_tmul` collapses it on a pure tensor.  The base ring functors `SтВА TтВА` and the
  -- objects `MтВБ MтВВ` are abstract (as in `restrictScalars_╬╝_app_tmul`) so the section module instances

/-- **Sectionwise value of the LHS mate tensorator on a pure tensor (blueprint
`lem:pushforward_lax_mu_comparison_lhs_tmul`), packaged as the per-section comparison.** In the K1
setting, on a fixed open `W` the adjoint-transported tensorator `╬╝ (rightAdjointLaxMonoidal hadj')`
agrees with the directly-defined composition tensorator `╬╝ (presheafPushforwardLaxMonoidal ╧Ж')` on the
objects `G╬▓.obj A`, `G╬▓.obj B`.  We work sectionwise via `tensor_ext`: the RHS pure-tensor value is
`m тКЧтВЬ n` by `pushforward_lax_mu_comparison_rhs_tmul`, and the genuine geometric residual is the LHS
*mate* value, obtained by unfolding the mate (`rightAdjointLaxMonoidal_╬╝` + `homEquiv_unit`) and

`pushforwardPushforwardAdj_unit_app_app_apply`; `╬┤ G╬▓` is the identity on pure tensors via the

lemma pushforward_lax_mu_comparison_lhs_tmul {X Y : Scheme.{u}} (f : Y тЯ╢ X)
    [IsOpenImmersion f]
    (A B : _root_.PresheafOfModules (X.presheaf тЛЩ forgetтВВ CommRingCat RingCat))
    (W : (TopologicalSpace.Opens тЖеX)с╡Тс╡Ц) :
    letI ╧Ж' : (X.presheaf тЛЩ forgetтВВ CommRingCat RingCat) тЯ╢
        (TopologicalSpace.Opens.map f.base).op тЛЩ (Y.presheaf тЛЩ forgetтВВ CommRingCat RingCat) :=
        (f.toRingCatSheafHom).hom
    haveI hRA : (PresheafOfModules.pushforward ╧Ж').IsRightAdjoint :=
      (PresheafOfModules.pullbackPushforwardAdjunction ╧Ж').isRightAdjoint
    let ╬▒ : Y.presheaf тЯ╢ f.opensFunctor.op тЛЩ X.presheaf :=
      { app := fun U => (f.appIso U.unop).inv
        naturality := fun _ _ i => f.appIso_inv_naturality i }
    let ╬▓ : Y.ringCatSheaf.obj тЯ╢ f.opensFunctor.op тЛЩ X.ringCatSheaf.obj :=
      Functor.whiskerRight ╬▒ (forgetтВВ CommRingCat RingCat)
    let hadj : PresheafOfModules.pushforward ╬▓ тКг PresheafOfModules.pushforward ╧Ж' :=
      PresheafOfModules.pushforwardPushforwardAdj f.isOpenEmbedding.isOpenMap.adjunction ╬▓ ╧Ж'
        (by ext U x; exact congr($((f.app_appIso_inv _).symm).hom x))
        (by ext U x; exact congr($(f.appIso_inv_app_presheafMap U.unop) x))
    have h╬▓ : тИА U, Function.Bijective (╬▓.app U).hom := by
      intro U
      haveI : IsIso (╬▓.app U) :=
        inferInstanceAs (IsIso ((forgetтВВ CommRingCat RingCat).map (f.appIso U.unop).inv))
      exact ConcreteCategory.bijective_of_isIso (╬▓.app U)
    let ╬▓' : (Y.presheaf тЛЩ forgetтВВ CommRingCat RingCat) тЯ╢
        (f.opensFunctor.op тЛЩ X.presheaf) тЛЩ forgetтВВ CommRingCat RingCat := ╬▓
    letI hMon╬▓ : (PresheafOfModules.restrictScalars ╬▓').Monoidal :=
      PresheafOfModules.restrictScalarsMonoidalOfBijective ╬▓' h╬▓
    letI G╬▓ := PresheafOfModules.pushforwardтВАOfCommRingCat f.opensFunctor X.presheaf тЛЩ
      PresheafOfModules.restrictScalars ╬▓'
    let hadj' : G╬▓ тКг PresheafOfModules.pushforward ╧Ж' := hadj

  intro ╬▒ ╬▓ hadj h╬▓ ╬▓' hadj'

  refine ModuleCat.MonoidalCategory.tensor_ext (fun m n => ?_)

  rw [PresheafOfModules.comp_app]
  erw [ModuleCat.hom_comp, LinearMap.comp_apply]

  -- (an `rfl`) refuses to fire via `rw`/`simp`/`erw` on the heavy tensor object

  have hU : тИА (M : _root_.PresheafOfModules (X.presheaf тЛЩ forgetтВВ CommRingCat RingCat))
      (U : (TopologicalSpace.Opens тЖеX)с╡Тс╡Ц) (x : (M.obj U)),
      ((hadj'.unit.app M).app U).hom x

  --      applied to `(G(G╬▓ A) тКЧ G(G╬▓ B)).map (adj.counit.app W.unop).op .hom (m тКЧтВЬ n)`,
  -- with `╬╡ = hadj'.counit`, `GX = G(G╬▓ A)`, `G = pushforward ╧Ж'`, `G╬▓ = pushforwardтВА тЛЩ restrictScalars ╬▓'`.

  -- section-evaluation `comp_app`/`hom_comp`/`comp_apply` so the LHS becomes the nested application

  rw [Functor.map_comp, PresheafOfModules.comp_app]
  erw [ModuleCat.hom_comp, LinearMap.comp_apply]

  -- `rw`/`erw` on the heavy `тКЧ` object (carrier-diamond: the goal's tensor objects carry type
  -- `PresheafOfModules X.ringCatSheaf.obj`, defeq-but-not-syntactic to `тАж тЛЩ forgetтВВ тАж`).  RECIPE:
  -- state a тИА-`have h1` keyed on an ABSTRACT ring functor `R` (so `R тЛЩ forgetтВВ _ _` matches the

lemma pushforward_lax_mu_comparison {X Y : Scheme.{u}} (f : Y тЯ╢ X) [IsOpenImmersion f]
    (A B : _root_.PresheafOfModules (X.presheaf тЛЩ forgetтВВ CommRingCat RingCat)) :
    letI ╧Ж' : (X.presheaf тЛЩ forgetтВВ CommRingCat RingCat) тЯ╢
        (TopologicalSpace.Opens.map f.base).op тЛЩ (Y.presheaf тЛЩ forgetтВВ CommRingCat RingCat) :=
        (f.toRingCatSheafHom).hom

      (PresheafOfModules.pullbackPushforwardAdjunction ╧Ж').isRightAdjoint

      { app := fun U => (f.appIso U.unop).inv

    let ╬▓ : Y.ringCatSheaf.obj тЯ╢ f.opensFunctor.op тЛЩ X.ringCatSheaf.obj :=
      Functor.whiskerRight ╬▒ (forgetтВВ CommRingCat RingCat)

      PresheafOfModules.pushforwardPushforwardAdj f.isOpenEmbedding.isOpenMap.adjunction ╬▓ ╧Ж'
        (by ext U x; exact congr($((f.app_appIso_inv _).symm).hom x))
        (by ext U x; exact congr($(f.appIso_inv_app_presheafMap U.unop) x))
    have h╬▓ : тИА U, Function.Bijective (╬▓.app U).hom := by
      intro U
      haveI : IsIso (╬▓.app U) :=
        inferInstanceAs (IsIso ((forgetтВВ CommRingCat RingCat).map (f.appIso U.unop).inv))
      exact ConcreteCategory.bijective_of_isIso (╬▓.app U)

        (f.opensFunctor.op тЛЩ X.presheaf) тЛЩ forgetтВВ CommRingCat RingCat := ╬▓
    letI hMon╬▓ : (PresheafOfModules.restrictScalars ╬▓').Monoidal :=
      PresheafOfModules.restrictScalarsMonoidalOfBijective ╬▓' h╬▓
    letI G╬▓ := PresheafOfModules.pushforwardтВАOfCommRingCat f.opensFunctor X.presheaf тЛЩ

  -- ASSEMBLY (iter-029, blueprint decomposition): the two lax structures on `pushforward ╧Ж'` agree on
  -- `G╬▓.obj A`, `G╬▓.obj B` as a *morphism* equality.  Reduce to the per-section comparison by
  -- `PresheafOfModules.hom_ext`, then defer each open `W` to `pushforward_lax_mu_comparison_lhs_tmul`,
  -- which works sectionwise via `tensor_ext`: the RHS pure-tensor value is `m тКЧтВЬ n` by
  -- `pushforward_lax_mu_comparison_rhs_tmul` (PROVEN), and the LHS *mate* pure-tensor value is the sole
  -- residual (the genuine NON-circular geometric seam; routing through `hadj'.IsMonoidal` is CIRCULAR).

/-- **Abstract mate-conjugation of two oplax tensorators sharing a right adjoint.** Let
`adjтВБ : FтВБ тКг G` and `adjтВВ : FтВВ тКг G` be two adjunctions onto the same lax-monoidal functor `G`, with
`FтВБ` (strong/oplax) and `FтВВ` oplax monoidal and `adjтВВ` a monoidal adjunction. If the right-adjoint-lax
tensorator `╬╝ (rightAdjointLaxMonoidal adjтВБ)` agrees, on the objects `FтВБ A`, `FтВБ B`, with the ambient
lax tensorator `╬╝ G` (the only genuine input, supplied non-circularly), then the strong oplax
tensorator `╬┤ FтВБ` equals the `leftAdjointUniq`-conjugate of `╬┤ FтВВ`. This is the abstract heart of the
K1 ╬╝/╬┤-collapse, stated with clean fvars so the mate `rw`-calculus carries no let-unfolding friction.
Proof: transpose across `adjтВБ.homEquiv`; `╬┤ FтВБ` becomes `╬╝ (rightAdjointLaxMonoidal adjтВБ)` by the
adjoint-mate identity `unit_app_tensor_comp_map_╬┤`; the conjugate `╬┤ FтВВ` leg contracts via
`unit_leftAdjointUniq_hom_app` (both ends) + `unit_app_tensor_comp_map_╬┤` for `adjтВВ` + `╬╝`-naturality;
the residual is exactly the hypothesis `h╬╝`. -/
lemma deltaConjOfMuComparison {C D : Type*} [Category C] [Category D]
    [MonoidalCategory C] [MonoidalCategory D]
    {FтВБ FтВВ : C тед D} {G : D тед C} (adjтВБ : FтВБ тКг G) (adjтВВ : FтВВ тКг G)
    [FтВБ.OplaxMonoidal] [FтВВ.OplaxMonoidal] [G.LaxMonoidal] [adjтВВ.IsMonoidal] (A B : C)
    (h╬╝ : @Functor.LaxMonoidal.╬╝ _ _ _ _ _ _ G (Adjunction.rightAdjointLaxMonoidal adjтВБ)
          (FтВБ.obj A) (FтВБ.obj B)
        = Functor.LaxMonoidal.╬╝ G (FтВБ.obj A) (FтВБ.obj B)) :
    Functor.OplaxMonoidal.╬┤ FтВБ A B
      = (adjтВБ.leftAdjointUniq adjтВВ).hom.app (A тКЧ B) тЙл Functor.OplaxMonoidal.╬┤ FтВВ A B
        тЙл ((adjтВБ.leftAdjointUniq adjтВВ).inv.app A тКЧтВШ (adjтВБ.leftAdjointUniq adjтВВ).inv.app B) := by
  -- (TRIтБ╗┬╣): `adjтВВ.unit P тЙл G.map (H1.inv P) = adjтВБ.unit P` (since `H1.inv = (leftAdjointUniq adjтВВ adjтВБ).hom`).
  have htri' : тИА P, adjтВВ.unit.app P тЙл G.map ((adjтВБ.leftAdjointUniq adjтВВ).inv.app P)
      = adjтВБ.unit.app P := by
    intro P
    rw [Adjunction.leftAdjointUniq_inv_app]
    exact Adjunction.unit_leftAdjointUniq_hom_app adjтВВ adjтВБ P
  -- (LHS mate): `╬┤ FтВБ` transposes to `╬╝ (rightAdjointLaxMonoidal adjтВБ)` (instance forced).
  have hLHS : adjтВБ.unit.app (A тКЧ B) тЙл G.map (Functor.OplaxMonoidal.╬┤ FтВБ A B)
      = (adjтВБ.unit.app A тКЧтВШ adjтВБ.unit.app B) тЙл
        @Functor.LaxMonoidal.╬╝ _ _ _ _ _ _ G (Adjunction.rightAdjointLaxMonoidal adjтВБ)
          (FтВБ.obj A) (FтВБ.obj B) := by
    letI := Adjunction.rightAdjointLaxMonoidal adjтВБ
    letI : adjтВБ.IsMonoidal := inferInstance
    exact adjтВБ.unit_app_tensor_comp_map_╬┤ A B
  -- ╬╝-naturality (tensorHom form) on the `H1.inv` legs; the `_left`/`_right` `@[simp]` variants are
  -- whiskering-based and do not fire on the `тКЧтВШ` form, so we feed the combined `╬╝_natural` by hand.
  have hnat := Functor.LaxMonoidal.╬╝_natural G ((adjтВБ.leftAdjointUniq adjтВВ).inv.app A)
    ((adjтВБ.leftAdjointUniq adjтВВ).inv.app B)
  -- Transpose across `adjтВБ`; `rw [hLHS]` turns the LHS `╬┤ FтВБ` into the mate `╬╝ (rightAdjointLaxMonoidal
  -- adjтВБ)`; `simp` runs the two `@[simp]` mate reductions (`unit_leftAdjointUniq_hom_app_assoc` on the
  -- `H1.hom` leg, `unit_app_tensor_comp_map_╬┤_assoc` on the `╬┤ FтВВ` leg) to the bare-╬╝ normal form.
  apply (adjтВБ.homEquiv _ _).injective
  rw [Adjunction.homEquiv_unit, Adjunction.homEquiv_unit]
  -- Re-establish the goal in clean instance form (load-bearing: makes `rw [hLHS]` match syntactically).
  show adjтВБ.unit.app (A тКЧ B) тЙл G.map (Functor.OplaxMonoidal.╬┤ FтВБ A B) =
    adjтВБ.unit.app (A тКЧ B) тЙл G.map ((adjтВБ.leftAdjointUniq adjтВВ).hom.app (A тКЧ B) тЙл
      Functor.OplaxMonoidal.╬┤ FтВВ A B тЙл
        ((adjтВБ.leftAdjointUniq adjтВВ).inv.app A тКЧтВШ (adjтВБ.leftAdjointUniq adjтВВ).inv.app B))
  rw [hLHS]
  -- v4.31.0 fix (axis: simp no longer fires the `_assoc` mate reductions automatically): run the two
  -- mate contractions by explicit `reassoc_of%` rewrites instead of `simp [..._╬┤_assoc]`, but inside
  -- `conv_rhs` so the rewrite motive is built over the RHS only тАФ after `rw [hLHS]` the LHS carries the
  -- mate `╬╝ (rightAdjointLaxMonoidal adjтВБ)` which is not type-correct under `instances` transparency, so
  -- a full-goal `rw` whose motive spans the LHS fails.  Distribute `G.map` over the RHS composite,
  -- contract `adjтВБ.unit тЙл G.map (H1.hom)` to `adjтВВ.unit` (`unit_leftAdjointUniq_hom_app`), then
  -- transpose `adjтВВ.unit тЙл G.map (╬┤ FтВВ)` to the bare ╬╝ (`unit_app_tensor_comp_map_╬┤` for `adjтВВ`).
  -- Then slide `╬╝` past the `H1.inv` legs (`тЖР hnat`) and merge the tensor; the residual is the
  -- per-factor contraction `htri'` and the bare tensorator comparison `h╬╝`, assembled defeq via
  -- `congr_argтВВ` (a direct `rw`/`simp` of these last two legs is blocked by the instance-path quirk).
  conv_rhs =>
    rw [Functor.map_comp, Functor.map_comp]
    -- the unit's source object prints as `(ЁЭЯн C).obj (A тКЧ B)` (not `A тКЧ B`), so the `reassoc_of%`
    -- pattern is matched up to defeq with `erw`, not `rw`.
    erw [reassoc_of% (Adjunction.unit_leftAdjointUniq_hom_app adjтВБ adjтВВ (A тКЧ B)),
      reassoc_of% (adjтВВ.unit_app_tensor_comp_map_╬┤ A B)]
    erw [тЖР hnat, тЖР Category.assoc, MonoidalCategory.tensorHom_comp_tensorHom]
  exact congr_argтВВ (┬╖ тЙл ┬╖)
    (congr_argтВВ MonoidalCategory.tensorHom (htri' A).symm (htri' B).symm) h╬╝

/-- **K1 ╬╝/╬┤-side collapse: `H1` respects the tensorator.** In the K1 setting, for all presheaves
of modules `A B`, the strong tensorator `╬┤ G╬▓ A B` of the restriction functor agrees with the
`H1`-conjugate of the oplax tensorator `╬┤ (pullback ╧Ж') A B`. This is the genuine geometric content
of K1 (the ╬╝/╬┤-side twin of `presheafUnit_comp_map_eta`, the open-immersion analogue of
`pushforwardComp_lax_╬╝`). It is the abstract mate-conjugation `deltaConjOfMuComparison` fed the bare
tensorator comparison `pushforward_lax_mu_comparison` (the genuine, NON-circular geometric input;
routing through `hadj'.IsMonoidal` would be circular, since that instance consumes this lemma). -/
lemma pushforward_mu_appIso_collapse {X Y : Scheme.{u}} (f : Y тЯ╢ X) [IsOpenImmersion f]
    (A B : _root_.PresheafOfModules (X.presheaf тЛЩ forgetтВВ CommRingCat RingCat)) :
    letI ╧Ж' : (X.presheaf тЛЩ forgetтВВ CommRingCat RingCat) тЯ╢
        (TopologicalSpace.Opens.map f.base).op тЛЩ (Y.presheaf тЛЩ forgetтВВ CommRingCat RingCat) :=
        (f.toRingCatSheafHom).hom
    haveI hRA : (PresheafOfModules.pushforward ╧Ж').IsRightAdjoint :=
      (PresheafOfModules.pullbackPushforwardAdjunction ╧Ж').isRightAdjoint
    let ╬▒ : Y.presheaf тЯ╢ f.opensFunctor.op тЛЩ X.presheaf :=
      { app := fun U => (f.appIso U.unop).inv
        naturality := fun _ _ i => f.appIso_inv_naturality i }
    let ╬▓ : Y.ringCatSheaf.obj тЯ╢ f.opensFunctor.op тЛЩ X.ringCatSheaf.obj :=
      Functor.whiskerRight ╬▒ (forgetтВВ CommRingCat RingCat)
    let hadj : PresheafOfModules.pushforward ╬▓ тКг PresheafOfModules.pushforward ╧Ж' :=
      PresheafOfModules.pushforwardPushforwardAdj f.isOpenEmbedding.isOpenMap.adjunction ╬▓ ╧Ж'
        (by ext U x; exact congr($((f.app_appIso_inv _).symm).hom x))
        (by ext U x; exact congr($(f.appIso_inv_app_presheafMap U.unop) x))
    have h╬▓ : тИА U, Function.Bijective (╬▓.app U).hom := by
      intro U
      haveI : IsIso (╬▓.app U) :=
        inferInstanceAs (IsIso ((forgetтВВ CommRingCat RingCat).map (f.appIso U.unop).inv))
      exact ConcreteCategory.bijective_of_isIso (╬▓.app U)
    let ╬▓' : (Y.presheaf тЛЩ forgetтВВ CommRingCat RingCat) тЯ╢
        (f.opensFunctor.op тЛЩ X.presheaf) тЛЩ forgetтВВ CommRingCat RingCat := ╬▓
    letI hMon╬▓ : (PresheafOfModules.restrictScalars ╬▓').Monoidal :=
      PresheafOfModules.restrictScalarsMonoidalOfBijective ╬▓' h╬▓
    letI G╬▓ := PresheafOfModules.pushforwardтВАOfCommRingCat f.opensFunctor X.presheaf тЛЩ
      PresheafOfModules.restrictScalars ╬▓'
    let hadj' : G╬▓ тКг PresheafOfModules.pushforward ╧Ж' := hadj
    Functor.OplaxMonoidal.╬┤ G╬▓ A B
      = (hadj'.leftAdjointUniq (PresheafOfModules.pullbackPushforwardAdjunction ╧Ж')).hom.app (A тКЧ B)
        тЙл Functor.OplaxMonoidal.╬┤ (PresheafOfModules.pullback ╧Ж') A B
        тЙл ((hadj'.leftAdjointUniq (PresheafOfModules.pullbackPushforwardAdjunction ╧Ж')).inv.app A
            тКЧтВШ (hadj'.leftAdjointUniq (PresheafOfModules.pullbackPushforwardAdjunction ╧Ж')).inv.app B) := by
  letI ╧Ж' : (X.presheaf тЛЩ forgetтВВ CommRingCat RingCat) тЯ╢
      (TopologicalSpace.Opens.map f.base).op тЛЩ (Y.presheaf тЛЩ forgetтВВ CommRingCat RingCat) :=
      (f.toRingCatSheafHom).hom
  haveI hRA : (PresheafOfModules.pushforward ╧Ж').IsRightAdjoint :=
    (PresheafOfModules.pullbackPushforwardAdjunction ╧Ж').isRightAdjoint
  let ╬▒ : Y.presheaf тЯ╢ f.opensFunctor.op тЛЩ X.presheaf :=
    { app := fun U => (f.appIso U.unop).inv
      naturality := fun _ _ i => f.appIso_inv_naturality i }
  let ╬▓ : Y.ringCatSheaf.obj тЯ╢ f.opensFunctor.op тЛЩ X.ringCatSheaf.obj :=
    Functor.whiskerRight ╬▒ (forgetтВВ CommRingCat RingCat)
  -- `hadj` is a `let` (not `have`): keeps the goal's `H1 = hadj'.leftAdjointUniq` term in its
  -- fully-unfolded `pushforwardPushforwardAdj тАж` form key-matchable via `erw` (cf. the ╬╖-side).
  let hadj : PresheafOfModules.pushforward ╬▓ тКг PresheafOfModules.pushforward ╧Ж' :=
    PresheafOfModules.pushforwardPushforwardAdj f.isOpenEmbedding.isOpenMap.adjunction ╬▓ ╧Ж'
      (by ext U x; exact congr($((f.app_appIso_inv _).symm).hom x))
      (by ext U x; exact congr($(f.appIso_inv_app_presheafMap U.unop) x))
  have h╬▓ : тИА U, Function.Bijective (╬▓.app U).hom := by
    intro U
    haveI : IsIso (╬▓.app U) :=
      inferInstanceAs (IsIso ((forgetтВВ CommRingCat RingCat).map (f.appIso U.unop).inv))
    exact ConcreteCategory.bijective_of_isIso (╬▓.app U)
  let ╬▓' : (Y.presheaf тЛЩ forgetтВВ CommRingCat RingCat) тЯ╢
      (f.opensFunctor.op тЛЩ X.presheaf) тЛЩ forgetтВВ CommRingCat RingCat := ╬▓
  letI hMon╬▓ : (PresheafOfModules.restrictScalars ╬▓').Monoidal :=
    PresheafOfModules.restrictScalarsMonoidalOfBijective ╬▓' h╬▓
  letI G╬▓ := PresheafOfModules.pushforwardтВАOfCommRingCat f.opensFunctor X.presheaf тЛЩ
    PresheafOfModules.restrictScalars ╬▓'
  let hadj' : G╬▓ тКг PresheafOfModules.pushforward ╧Ж' := hadj
  -- ╬┤-side of "H1 is a monoidal natural iso": the genuine geometric content of K1, discharged by the
  -- abstract mate-conjugation `deltaConjOfMuComparison` (clean fvars тАФ no let-fold/instance friction),
  -- fed the bare tensorator comparison `pushforward_lax_mu_comparison`.  Routing through
  -- `hadj'.IsMonoidal` would be circular, as that instance (K1's `hmon`) consumes this lemma.
  exact deltaConjOfMuComparison hadj' (PresheafOfModules.pullbackPushforwardAdjunction ╧Ж') A B
    (pushforward_lax_mu_comparison f A B)

/-- **Abstract iso-sandwich: an oplax tensorator conjugate to a strong one is an iso.**
If `FтВБ` is strong monoidal (so its oplax `╬┤` is invertible), `FтВВ` is oplax monoidal, `e : FтВБ тЙЕ FтВВ`
is any natural iso, and the `╬┤`'s are conjugate via `e`
(`╬┤ FтВБ A B = e.hom.app (AтКЧB) тЙл ╬┤ FтВВ A B тЙл (e.inv.app A тКЧтВШ e.inv.app B)`, the conclusion of
`pushforward_mu_appIso_collapse`), then `╬┤ FтВВ A B` is itself an iso: it equals the all-iso
composite `inv (e.hom.app (AтКЧB)) тЙл ╬┤ FтВБ A B тЙл inv (e.inv.app A тКЧтВШ e.inv.app B)`. -/
lemma isIso_oplax╬┤_of_conj {C D : Type*} [Category C] [Category D]
    [MonoidalCategory C] [MonoidalCategory D] {FтВБ FтВВ : C тед D}
    [FтВБ.Monoidal] [FтВВ.OplaxMonoidal] (e : FтВБ тЙЕ FтВВ) (A B : C)
    (hconj : Functor.OplaxMonoidal.╬┤ FтВБ A B
      = e.hom.app (A тКЧ B) тЙл Functor.OplaxMonoidal.╬┤ FтВВ A B
        тЙл (e.inv.app A тКЧтВШ e.inv.app B)) :
    IsIso (Functor.OplaxMonoidal.╬┤ FтВВ A B) := by
  have h2 : Functor.OplaxMonoidal.╬┤ FтВВ A B
      = inv (e.hom.app (A тКЧ B)) тЙл Functor.OplaxMonoidal.╬┤ FтВБ A B
        тЙл inv (e.inv.app A тКЧтВШ e.inv.app B) := by
    rw [hconj]; simp
  rw [h2]; infer_instance
